title: KPI Manager / Operations Analyst
description:
We are looking for a highly detail-oriented KPI Manager to track, analyze, and enforce performance across multiple business units (real estate, cleaning services, and property management).



Your role is NOT to perform the work, but to ensure that the work is being done, tracked, and improving week over week.

You will be responsible for building and maintaining weekly scoreboards, identifying performance gaps, and ensuring accountability across the team.



Core Responsibilities:

- Track weekly KPIs across all departments (sales, operations, marketing)

- Collect and verify performance data from tea
mbers

- Maintain and update KPI dashboards (Google Sheets)

- Identify underperformance and flag issues immediately

- Assign and follow up on corrective actions

- Ensure all activities are logged in CRM systems

- Monitor call activity and verify outreach performance

- Prepare and send a weekly KPI report (structured format)

- Ensure all tea
mbers are accountable to targets



What You Will NOT Do:

- You will not perform sales, customer service, or operations tasks

- You will not manage projects directly

- You will not execute work—your job is tracking and accountability



Requirements:

- Strong attention to detail (this is critical)

- Experience with Google Sheets / Excel

- Ability to follow systems and enforce structure

- Strong written communication

- Comfortable working with data and numbers

- Ability to follow up persistently without hesitation



Compensation:

$4–7/hour (depending on experience)



Success Looks Like:

- All KPIs are updated weekly without fail

- Performance issues are identified before they become problems

- Tea
mbers are consistently held accountable

- Business performance improves week over week

title: Kitchen Designer with 2020 experience
description:
Mod Kitchens and Design Center is a Canadian kitchen, bath, closet, and flooring design company. We are expanding our design team and looking for a talented remote kitchen designer who can support our client projects by producing accurate layouts, elevations, and renderings in 2020 Design Live.



You’ll work closely with our lead designers, who handle client meetings, and you’ll handle the production design work behind the scenes.



We value:



speed



accuracy



consistency



clear communication



???? Role Overview



You will be responsible for preparing complete design packages based on the design brief provided by our in-house team.



Your Responsibilities



? Create kitchen layouts in 2020 Design Live

? Produce 2D floor plans

? Produce cabinet elevations

? Produce 3D renderings (3–5 views)

? Create cabinet lists / takeoffs and input into online order system

? Make revisions based on feedback

? Follow our company’s design standards and cabinet rules

? Communicate clearly and meet deadlines



You do not need to meet with clients — our Canada-based designers take care of that.



???? Required Skills



? 2+ years experience in kitchen design

? Strong proficiency with 2020 Design Live

title: Business Development Manager
description:
We're looking for a highly organized and relationship-focused Business Development Manager to help manage and grow a large network of professional contacts in the entertainment industry (music, sports, film/TV, digital). This role is about meaningful outreach, follow-up, and building long-term trust across a large portfolio.



If you're detail-oriented, a strong communicator, and excited by the world of entertainment, this role could be a great fit. Must have good English writing abilities without use of AI. 



What You’ll Be Doing:



- Manage a High Volume of Contacts: Oversee a large list of professional accounts, ensuring regular communication and accurate recordkeeping.

- Outreach & Relationship Building: Proactively reach out to contacts via
 and social media to stay connected, share updates, and strengthen professional relationships.

- Craft Well-Written Messages: Write polished, thoughtful
s and messages in English—clear, natural communication is key.

- Track Progress: Use tools like HubSpot to manage follow-ups, keep conversations organized, and hit relationship-building goals.

- Work Toward Clear Targets: While there’s no selling involved, this role does have measurable outreach and engagement goals.

- Think Creatively: Develop new approaches for keeping relationships active, warm, and productive over time.



Who We’re Looking For:

- Excellent written English—you’re comfortable writing professional messages and outreach
s with clarity and polish. - - -- Must have strong English writing and speaking abilities.

- Extremely organized—you can juggle many accounts and keep your outreach and follow-ups on track.

- Self-motivated and driven—you take initiative, meet goals, and stay focused without constant supervision.

- Relationship-minded—you enjoy connecting with people and maintaining positive, long-term communication.

- Familiarity with CRM tools like HubSpot is a plus.

- Spanish fluency is a plus, but not required.

- A genuine interest in the entertainment industry—especially music, sports, film/TV, or digital media—will help you succeed in this role.

title: Job Title: Sales and Solutions Specialist – phone sales, online sales, customer service
description:
Sales and Solutions Specialists for Willis Lawn Services



About the Role

Are you a people person who loves solving puzzles? We are looking for a Sales & Solutions Specialist to join our team in 2026. This isn't just about "closing deals"—it’s about listening to our neighbors and providing real solutions that make their lives easier. You will be the first point of contact for our sales leads, ensuring they feel heard and valued from the very first hello!

Our company helps homeowners create beautiful yards by providing effective solutions for lawn and insect problems. While prior knowledge of our specific services isn't required, we are looking for candidates who are eager to learn the details of what we do!



What You’ll Do

- Engage with Leads: This role is primarily phone-based. You will spend your day talking directly to interested leads, acting as the friendly, professional voice of our company.

- Answer In-Depth Questions: Our customers are looking for experts. You will be expected to answer a high volume of questions with patience, clarity, and a "help-first" attitude.

- Precision Quoting: Use modern online mapping and measurement tools to accurately assess customer properties and generate custom quotes.

- Consultative Selling: Guide interested leads through our process and handle the signup for those ready to hire our team.

- Build Trust: Ensure every interaction reinforces our commitment to showing customers that they truly matter to us.



What We’re Looking For

 - Strong English Proficiency: Because you will be the primary point of contact for our sales leads, you must have excellent verbal and written English communication skills.

- Exceptional Communicators: You can turn a phone call into a relationship and explain services clearly.

- Tech-Savvy: Comfortable using CRM systems to manage your workflow, ready to learn how to measure properties online for quotes.

- Solution-Oriented: You don't just sell; you listen and recommend what is best for the customer’s specific situation.

- Detail-Oriented: Accurate measurements lead to accurate quotes—you take pride in getting the details right.



This job will be a graveyard shift position. We need someone to work 9am to 5:30pm Central Standard Time (CST) Monday through Friday, which is 11pm to 7:30am Philippine Standard Time (PST) Tuesday through Saturday  (10pm to 6:30am PST when the United States is under Daylight Savings time from Sun, Mar 8, 2026 to Sun, Nov 1, 2026). 

**This includes a 30 minute UNPAID lunch break, for a total of 40 hours worked per week. You may also take two PAID 10 minute breaks, during your shift.**



To Apply:

To be considered, please submit your resume with a link to a Loom video at the very top of your message.  In the video, please introduce yourself and explain why you’re a great fit for our team, our mission to provide real solutions for our neighbors, and our commitment to making every customer feel valued!

title: Payment Processing / Support Assistant (Night Shift)
description:
At Higher Support Agency, we help online businesses run smoothly by providing reliable customer support, payment processing, and operational assistance. We work closely with ecommerce brands to support their day-to-day operations behind the scenes.



We’re currently looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Customer Support Assistant to join our team. This role is primarily focused on payment processing, with some light operational and customer support tasks as needed. Compared to a standard Customer Support Representative role, this position is less demanding and more task-focused, making it ideal for someone who is organized, dependable, and comfortable working independently.



Role Overview:

We’re looking for a reliable and detail-oriented assistant to support our ecommerce operations.



This role is mainly focused on payment processing and internal tasks, with some light customer support when needed. Compared to a typical customer service role, this position is more structured, task-based, and lower volume.



Most of your work will involve following clear processes and ensuring everything is accurate and organized.



Key Responsibilities:

- Verify, log, and process customer payments accurately

- Ensure associated orders are correctly recorded and moved forward for fulfillment

- Maintain organized and accurate records of payments and transactions

- Occasionally assist with inventory updates or product listings

- Provide light chat and email support when required

- Coordinate with internal teams to ensure smooth order handling

- Flag and escalate any payment or order issues when needed

- Follow established processes and communicate clearly if issues or improvements are identified



Qualifications:

- At least 2 years of experience in an ecommerce or customer support–related role

- Strong written communication skills for basic chat and email responses

- Experience using CRM or ticketing systems (Zendesk, Gorgias, or similar)

- Familiarity with ecommerce platforms such as WooCommerce or Shopify

- Comfortable using Google Sheets for tracking, logging, and basic formulas

- Highly detail-oriented with strong organizational skills

- Able to work independently with minimal supervision

- Reliable, consistent, and comfortable handling routine processing tasks

- Must have a stable internet connection, computer/laptop, and an additional monitor



Schedule & Work Setup:

This is a fully remote, full-time position. Schedule may vary slightly based on business needs, but the current schedule is:

Week 1 – Training:

 Monday to Friday, 6:00 AM – 2:00 PM PST

 (9:00 PM – 5:00 AM Philippine Time)



Week 2 onward:

 Same schedule as training

 Monday to Friday, 6:00 AM – 2:00 PM PST

 (9:00 PM – 5:00 AM Philippine Time)



*This role follows Pacific Time (Canada).*



To apply for this job, please fill out this form: https://forms.gle/y6dNaVXWJFeYtLyN8 so we have a better idea of you as an applicant. Looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Marketing Assistant (Full-Time)
description:
Company: Truit

Position: Marketing Assistant (Full-Time)

Location: Remote (Philippines only)

Work Hours: Monday–Friday | 8:00 AM–5:00 PM (U.S. Pacific Time)

Salary: USD $800–$1,000/month (based on experience and performance)



Why Join Truit?



Truit is a U.S.-based Managed IT and Cybersecurity company helping small and mid-sized businesses improve how they operate through better IT, cybersecurity, and systems.



We’re growing our marketing efforts and are looking for a Marketing Assistant to help with consistent execution across social media,
, and LinkedIn. This role supports ongoing campaigns and works closely with the team to keep marketing moving forward.



This is a hands-on, collaborative role for someone who enjoys execution, organization, and contributing ideas while working within an established brand.





The Purpose of This Role



Your role is to support and contribute to marketing execution.



You will work closely with:

- John (CEO) for marketing-related tasks and follow-ups



Campaigns, content direction, and priorities are planned together. You will help execute marketing activities, keep tasks organized, and follow through on assigned work.



Part of this role includes creating content for posts and campaigns, making sure it aligns with Truit’s brand, tone, and voice. You won’t be guessing or operating in isolation. You’ll have direction, examples, and feedback to help you stay aligned.





What Success Looks Like (First 90 Days)

- Marketing tasks are completed on time with clear communication

- Social media,
, and LinkedIn activities run consistently based on the agreed plan

What You’ll Be Doing

- Create and schedule social media posts that match Truit’s brand and tone

- Assist with
 campaigns, including basic content creation and setup

- Support LinkedIn posting, engagement, and campaign activities

- Help organize marketing calendars, tasks, and deadlines

- Track assigned marketing to-dos and provide regular updates

- Assist with campaign setup and workflows in Go High Level (GHL)

- Participate in team brainstorming and review sessions

- Share simple weekly updates on completed tasks and activity





Required Skills & Experience

- Experience supporting B2B marketing (assistant or coordinator level)

- Ability to create marketing content for posts and campaigns using existing brand direction

- Comfortable with social media posting and
 marketing

- Familiarity with Go High Level (GHL) or similar marketing tools

- Good written and spoken English

- Organized, dependable, and comfortable working as part of a team



Nice to Have (Not Required)

- Experience with IT, MSP, or cybersecurity companies

- Experience supporting a marketing manager or business owner

- A portfolio of social posts,
 campaigns, or marketing work





What You’ll Get

- Full-time, long-term remote role

- Clear collaboration and guidance

- Opportunity to improve marketing and content skills

- Supportive, team-focused work environment

- Consistent schedule and expectations





How to Apply

Please submit:

Your updated CV

Your portfolio (if available)



NOTE: Apply using 8 points or more.

title: Administrative Assistant
description:
Virtual Assistant / Administrative Assistant

Armco Aquatics | Remote | Full-Time



About Armco Aquatics

Armco Aquatics is a 25-year-old aquarium installation and maintenance company dedicated to making it easy for clients to own their dream aquarium. We serve residential and commercial clients with a small, tight-knit team built around four core values: caring, consistency, craftsmanship, and curiosity. We run a professional operation with real systems, clear processes, and a culture that takes quality seriously.



The Opportunity

We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant / Administrative Assistant to join our team and take ownership of the day-to-day administrative tasks that keep our operation running smoothly. This is a support and execution role — not an operations management or leadership seat. If you love checklists, clean records, and closing loops completely, this role was built for you.

You'll work closely with our Office Manager (and directly with our Founder during the onboarding period) to handle routine administrative work so our leadership team can stay focused on growing the business.



What You'll Do

Communication handling — Answer incoming calls and
s using approved scripts, provide routine information, and route non-standard requests to the correct tea
mber

Job creation — Check accepted estimates and create jobs accurately in our field service software (Service Fusion)

Scheduling support — Maintain company calendars; update appointments, reminders, and key administrative dates

Customer follow-up — Send job confirmations, appointment reminders, and routine follow-up communications

Onboarding admin — Complete customer and employee onboarding steps using approved checklists; maintain personnel files and onboarding packets

Purchasing support — Create purchase orders from approved requests and place pre-approved routine orders within defined spending limits

Record keeping — Maintain organized digital files, update templates, compile administrative data, and enforce document version control

Team communication — Update internal communication channels (Google Chat) with approved routine notices



What This Role Is Not

This is a checklist-driven execution seat, not a decision-making role. You will not own operational priorities, financial control, HR decisions, or leadership systems. When something falls outside your approved SOPs, you escalate — quickly and clearly. That's a feature, not a limitation.



What We're Looking For

Must-haves:

Strong attention to detail — data accuracy is non-negotiable in this role

Excellent written and verbal communication in English

Comfortable working independently from documented SOPs and checklists

Reliable, consistent, and responsive during agreed working hours

Experience with Google Workspace (Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Chat, Google Drive)

Comfortable learning new software (we use Service Fusion for field service management)

Nice-to-haves:

Prior experience in a home services, field service, or trade-based business

Experience with CRM or field service software

Bookkeeping or purchase order processing experience

Character traits that thrive here:

You follow the process first and ask questions when something's unclear — you don't guess

You close loops; things don't fall through the cracks on your watch

You communicate proactively when something is off or you're blocked

You take pride in clean, accurate records



Performance Standards

You'll be measured on:

Response time to routine phone and
 inquiries (within agreed service standard)

Job creation accuracy from accepted estimates

Calendar, file, and personnel record accuracy

Onboarding packet completion timeliness

Administrative task completion rate by due date

Escalation compliance — exceptions routed correctly without missed handoffs



Compensation & Details

Type: Remote / Virtual

Hours: [Full-time]

Rate: [Competitive — based on experience]

Schedule: [Monday–Friday, hours TBD]



How to Apply

Please submit:

A brief introduction describing your relevant administrative experience

Your resume or work history

Any tools or software platforms you are proficient with

Your availability and desired hours/rate

We respond to every applicant. We're looking for someone who will grow with us — if you're dependable, systems-oriented, and take quality seriously, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Outbound Appointment Setter / Sales Development Representative (Part-Time to Full Time)

About the Role



We are looking for a high-energy, results-driven Outbound Appointment Setter / SDR to help us connect with qualified leads, book calls, and support business growth through proactive outbound efforts.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys being on the phone, knows how to build trust quickly, and thrives in a performance-based environment. You should be comfortable making a high volume of outbound calls, handling objections, and converting conversations into booked appointments.



We are not just looking for someone who can “dial.” We want someone with a hunter mentality someone who enjoys the challenge of outbound sales and knows how to turn conversations into opportunities.



What You’ll Do

Book qualified appointments for the sales team

What We’re Looking For

Strong outbound calling or appointment setting experience



Excellent English communication skills

Able to build rapport quickly and lower resistance in conversations

Ideal background:

Experience in service-based businesses, B2B, coaching, healthcare, or similar industries is a plus

What Success Looks Like

title: Figma Website Designer Wanted - Immediate Start
description:
We are currently looking for a creative and reliable Figma Designer to join our team and assist with the design of websites and landing pages for ongoing projects.



In this role, you will be responsible for creating clean, modern Figma designs that will later be developed into fully functioning websites. Our team will provide guidelines, examples, and clear instructions, but we are looking for someone who can also bring their own creativity and design sense to each project.



Most of the websites we design are within the trades and construction industry, including businesses such as electricians, plumbers, builders, landscapers, and other similar services. Because of this, experience designing service-based business websites would be very beneficial.



We are looking for someone who can work efficiently and meet relatively quick timelines, as many of our projects move at a fast pace. There will be ongoing work available for the right person who can consistently deliver high-quality designs.



Responsibilities:



• Design website and landing page layouts in Figma

• Follow guidelines and instructions provided by our team

• Create clean, professional layouts that are conversion-focused and user-friendly

• Structure designs so they can be easily developed by our development team

• Ensure designs are organized, consistent, and visually appealing

• Deliver designs within the required project timelines



Requirements:



• Strong experience using Figma for website design

• Good understanding of modern website layout and user experience

• Ability to follow instructions while still contributing creative design ideas

• Strong attention to detail and clean design structure

• Ability to work efficiently under tight timelines

• Reliable communication and availability for ongoing work



To confirm that you have read the full job listing, please include the phrase “I listen to Dylan” somewhere in your application.



When applying, please include examples of Figma website designs you have created. If you have examples of trades or construction-related websites (electricians, plumbers, builders, etc.), that would be especially helpful.



We are looking for someone who can become a reliable part of our team and assist with ongoing Figma design work for websites and landing pages.

title: Amazon Brand Manager & Brand Manager Intern

title: Outbound Sales Development Representative & Business Development Representative
description:
OUTBOUND SALES DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE



This role is strategically focused on generating new business opportunities through targeted outbound outreach. The Outbound SDR serves as the first point of contact for potential clients, identifying prospects, initiating conversations, and driving them into the sales pipeline. You will manage outbound campaigns, conduct personalized outreach, and build strong engagement with high-value leads. This position requires strong persistence, excellent communication skills, and the ability to build effective processes for high-touch outbound engagement.



Goal:

To create a steady flow of qualified outbound opportunities by identifying, engaging, and advancing potential clients into meaningful sales conversations.



Key Responsibilities:

- Outbound Prospecting: Identify and target potential clients through
, calls, and social outreach to generate qualified leads for the sales team.

- Personalized Outreach: Create tailored messaging for specific industries, decision-makers, or company profiles to increase engagement and response rates.

- Pipeline Generation: Build and maintain a strong pipeline of outbound leads, ensuring consistent activity and follow-ups.

- Lead Qualification: Evaluate outbound prospects to ensure alignment with service offerings and pass qualified opportunities to the sales team.

- Collaboration With Sales & Marketing: Work closely with sales to refine ideal client profiles and with marketing to improve outbound messaging and campaign performance.

- CRM Management: Keep detailed, accurate records of outreach activity, follow-ups, and prospect interactions within the CRM.

- Process Building & Optimization: Develop, refine, and scale processes for efficient and high-touch outbound engagement.



Qualifications:

- Experience in outbound sales, lead generation, or a similar role is preferred.

- Strong organizational skills with excellent attention to detail.

- Proven track record of consistently meeting or exceeding outreach and pipeline targets.

- Advanced knowledge of HubSpot preferred; experience with other CRM tools is a plus.

- Exceptional verbal and written communication skills

- Motivated self-starter with the ability to work independently and drive tasks forward.

- Comfortable with leadership, taking initiative, and improving workflows.

- Strong interpersonal skills: able to communicate value clearly, handle objections, and build rapport during outbound conversations.

- Has a history of building processes around high-touch outbound client engagement.





--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE



Do you enjoy doing sales while collaborating with people? How about doing content on TikTok, Instagram, or on Loom? Can you express yourself fluently in English? If you said yes to all three, My Amazon Guy has the perfect job offer for you!

title: US Recruiting Sourcer / Talent Researcher – Remote | $400–$600 USD
description:
US Talent Researcher / Recruiting Sourcer – Remote | $400–$600 USD

Discover the professionals leading major construction projects across the United States.

Help identify the Project Managers, Superintendents, and leaders who build hospitals, stadiums, and large commercial developments.



If you enjoy research, solving puzzles, and finding hard-to-locate professionals online, this role will be exciting and rewarding.

You’ll work with a U.S. executive recruiting team that places leadership talent at construction companies across the country.

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys digging deep, uncovering talent, and building organized pipelines of candidates.



Strong performers can grow into Senior Sourcer or full-cycle Recruiter roles over time.



***What You'll Be Doing***

• Research and identify construction professionals across the United States

• Use LinkedIn, ZoomInfo/Apollo, and advanced search techniques to find candidates

• Build structured candidate pipelines for active recruiting projects

• Organize and track talent information inside Google Sheets or CRM

• Conduct basic qualification research (title, location, experience)

• Work closely with recruiters to support open roles and hiring targets



This role is research-driven and detail-focused.



***What Success Looks Like***

Within your first 90 days you will learn how to:

• Day 30: Identify 30–50 qualified professionals per week

• Day 60: Support 8–12 candidate submissions per week

• Day 90: Build consistent talent pipelines for multiple recruiting projects



***Ideal Background***

• Strong internet research skills; organized and detail-oriented

• Curious and persistent when searching for information

• Comfortable working with spreadsheets and online tools

• Strong written English communication



***Helpful but not required***

• Experience sourcing U.S. candidates

• Recruiting or talent research experience

• Familiarity with LinkedIn search or Boolean searches



***Compensation and Growth***

Base salary: $400–$600 USD per month depending on experience

Career path toward Senior Sourcer or full-cycle Recruiter roles



***Work Schedule***

• US Eastern Time schedule (Philippines night shift) • Monday to Friday

• Minimum 50 Mbps internet connection with backup

• Quiet workspace and reliable headset



***How to Apply (Follow Exactly)***

Subject line: SOURCER – [Your Name]

• Include your resume and  a brief recording introducing yourself and highlighting your sourcing experience

• Submit one Boolean string for a Senior Project Manager (construction) and explain it briefly

If you’re ready to build a meaningful career in recruitment, sharpen your research skills, and help shape the teams behind America’s most ambitious construction projects — we want to hear from you.

title: Financial Controller (UK, QuickBooks, GHL)
description:
Little Pixies Studios is on a mission to make every child become the hero of their own story through magical photography experiences.



At Little Pixies, we don’t just hire for open roles. We hire for impact. If you’re exceptional at what you do and align with our core values: Competitive Greatness, Sincere Candour, and Unimpeachable Character, we want to know you.



Important: Do NOT apply if you have not previously worked on UK accounts, UK VAT, and QuickBooks Online in a meaningful hands-on way.



This is not a junior bookkeeping role. We need someone who can understand business reality, spot where the numbers are wrong, fix broken finance processes, and build a finance function leadership can trust.



Role

We’re looking for a Part-Time Financial Controller to join our team.



This is a senior hands-on finance role because we do not just want someone to maintain the books. We want someone who can take ownership of the numbers, fix what is currently broken, and help us build a cleaner, more reliable finance function over time.



In the beginning, this is a hands-on fixing role. You will be responsible for getting deep into our current accounting setup and helping us solve real operational finance problems, including:



GoHighLevel to QuickBooks Online sync issues

Incorrect handling of discounts and VAT

The correct accounting treatment for in-house layaway / payment plan arrangements

Reconciliation and treatment of multiple payment providers and lender flows

Improving the reliability of month-end reporting

Making sure VAT is being handled properly and consistently

Over time, you will help us build the machine. That means improving controls, standardising workflows, documenting processes, strengthening reporting, and helping us create a finance setup that is accurate, understandable, and scalable.

This is an ownership role. You will be accountable for the quality of the books, the integrity of the balance sheet, the reliability of management reporting, and the financial processes that support the company.



Who this role is for:

You are a top performer at your current company or with your current clients.

You have strong hands-on experience in senior bookkeeping, finance operations, or financial controller responsibilities.

You have worked on UK entities and understand UK VAT, MTD, and the realities of running finance in a real operating business, not just in a textbook.

You are highly competent in QuickBooks Online.

You are comfortable getting into messy situations and fixing them properly.

You understand that good finance is not just about bookkeeping accuracy. It is about understanding the real business process underneath the numbers.

You are methodical, commercially aware, and able to think clearly through complexity.

You are comfortable being held to a high standard.

You like responsibility.

You want to be judged on results.



Responsibilities:

Own the integrity of the finance function on a day-to-day basis

Review, fix, and improve the current QuickBooks Online setup

Investigate and stabilise the GoHighLevel to QuickBooks Online workflow so transactions, discounts, VAT, and totals are flowing correctly

Define and implement the correct accounting treatment for in-house layaway / instalment arrangements

Build and maintain a clean accounting structure for multiple payment providers, including reconciliations, clearing accounts, fees, settlements, refunds, and chargebacks where relevant

Ensure VAT treatment is correct and that MTD filing is clean, timely, and supportable

Own monthly reconciliations and month-end close discipline

Prepare clear monthly management reporting that leadership can rely on

Work with leadership to identify where current financial reporting is weak, inaccurate, delayed, or misleading

Document finance processes and create SOPs so the finance function becomes more repeatable and less person-dependent

Work effectively with external accountants where needed, while being capable of challenging poor advice or weak execution

Advise on whether QuickBooks remains the right platform long term, and if not, help evaluate and support migration to a better system

Balance sheet accounts are properly reconciled and understood

GoHighLevel to QuickBooks transactions are mapped correctly and produce reliable outputs

Discounts and VAT are handled correctly and consistently

Payment provider flows are properly reconciled and do not create ongoing confusion at month-end

VAT is filed correctly and on time with proper audit trail and support

Monthly management reporting is delivered consistently and leadership can rely on it

Finance processes become clearer, more controlled, and less dependent on ad hoc fixes

Over time, meaningful improvement in the quality, speed, and reliability of the entire finance function



Requirements:

5+ years minimum experience in senior bookkeeping, finance operations, or financial controller responsibilities

Strong hands-on QuickBooks Online experience

Strong practical experience with UK VAT and MTD

Experience cleaning up or improving messy accounting setups

Experience reconciling complex payment flows

Strong understanding of management accounts and balance sheet integrity

Strong written and spoken English

Able to explain accounting issues clearly and practically

Self-sufficient and able to manage and prioritise your own time

Comfortable with feedback and high standards

Open to learning our business deeply rather than staying at surface level

Must have regular overlap with UK business hours



Strong advantage:

Previous experience with GoHighLevel

Experience with CRM / invoicing / accounting integrations

Experience with payment plans, deferred revenue, customer deposits, or similar arrangements

Experience with multiple payment providers, lenders, or BNPL-style settlement flows

Experience assessing or supporting accounting system migration

Experience in a high-growth SME or owner-led business where systems were not perfect and needed to be improved



What we offer you:

A role with real ownership and real responsibility

Direct impact on a growing premium brand

The chance to fix and build something properly rather than just maintain an inherited mess

A high-standard environment where accuracy and truth matter

A business that values people who can think, improve systems, and raise the standard



Location

Remote. Contractor role.



Days and Hours

Part-time.



Expected commitment: 20–25 hours per week initially.



Must have overlap with UK business hours Monday to Friday.



Compensation

Competitive and based on experience, location, and proven ability.



Apply directly here: 



Core Values

Our core values are the heart and soul of this incredible company. The right person for this role will appreciate each of these values, personally subscribe to them, and understand why each is critical to having a great business.



Competitive Greatness

Be at your best when your best is needed. Enjoyment of a hard challenge. Those who have the drive to constantly improve, the superior intellect and long term commitment to see incremental improvements become compounding returns.



Sincere Candour

Have the self awareness to accurately perceive and communicate hard truths that improve others and self, the courage to do so, and the humility to accept them, even when it hurts. Nothing great can be built without feedback: internally or externally.



Unimpeachable Character

Be the type of person with whom people are always proud to associate, personally and professionally. We look for true alignment of thoughts, words, and actions towards a goal worth pursuing.

title: Creative Strategist for ecom brand
description:
Who We Are

We're an e-commerce brand in the tech/outdoor/hobby space looking for a Creative Strategist to join our team on an ongoing basis. You'll be responsible for writing ad scripts and developing creative angles that drive sales.



What You'll Do



Write 20+ ad scripts per week (UGC scripts, static ad concepts, video ad hooks, etc.)

Research competitors, trends, and winning ads in our niche

Develop fresh creative angles and messaging strategies

Collaborate with our team to keep content performance improving





Requirements (Please Read Carefully)



You MUST have experience as a Creative Strategist for e-commerce brands. This is not a junior or entry-level role. We need someone who has done this work before and can show results.

You MUST have worked with tech, outdoor, or hobby brands/products. If your experience is only in fashion, beauty, or food — this is probably not the right fit.

You MUST send your full portfolio with your application. This can be a link to a Google Drive, Notion page, personal website, or PDF — whatever works. Just make sure we can see real examples of scripts, creative strategies, or ad concepts you've created.



?? Applications without a portfolio will NOT be reviewed. No exceptions.



How the Hiring Process Works



You apply and include your portfolio

We review your work

If we like what we see, we'll give you a paid test project

If the test goes well, you join the team on an ongoing retainer

Payment will be processed through Upwork for both the test and ongoing work





Good to Know



This is a part-time, ongoing role — not a one-off project

We value speed, creativity, and someone who understands what makes people click and buy

You should be comfortable writing a high volume of scripts weekly

Reliable communication and meeting deadlines is a must





How to Apply

Send a message with:



A brief intro about yourself

Your experience with e-commerce creative strategy (specifically for tech/outdoor/hobby products)

Your portfolio link or attached portfolio (again — no portfolio = no review)



We're excited to find the right person for this. If you love writing ads and thinking about what makes people buy — we want to hear from you.

title: AI Creative / Art Director - Remote
description:
Please follow the application instructions below



About the Role



We’re looking for a forward-thinking Art Director who can transform complex ideas into compelling visual stories. This role combines creative direction, visual storytelling, and AI-powered design, driving high-impact campaigns across film, digital, and social platforms.



You’ll lead the creative vision from concept to execution—ensuring all outputs are visually engaging, strategically aligned, and culturally relevant.



What You’ll Be Doing



Translate Ideas into Visual Concepts



Turn complex technical, scientific, or product ideas into clear and engaging visual narratives

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to bring concepts to life through design and storytelling



Develop Creative Campaigns



Lead the development of big-picture creative concepts for films, social media, and product launches

Create cohesive visual directions that align with brand identity and campaign goals

Contribute to ideation, mood boards, and storyboards



Lead Visual Storytelling



Oversee end-to-end visual execution across video, animation, and digital content

Ensure consistency in style, tone, and storytelling from concept to final output

Guide designers, editors, and creatives to deliver high-quality work



On-Set & Production Direction



Provide creative direction during live-action shoots and motion graphics production

Ensure all visuals align with brand standards and creative strategy

Collaborate closely with production teams to execute the vision



Use AI for Design & Prototyping



Leverage AI tools such as Midjourney, DALL·E, Adobe Firefly, Runway, and similar platforms

Rapidly prototype concepts and accelerate creative workflows

Explore new AI-driven approaches to enhance visual output



Ensure Strategic & Cultural Relevance



Align all creative work with brand strategy, audience insights, and current trends

Stay updated on emerging design, media, and AI innovations

Ensure content resonates with target audiences across platforms



What We’re Looking For



Creative & Design Expertise



Strong portfolio demonstrating art direction, visual storytelling, and campaign work

Excellent understanding of composition, typography, colour, and design principles

Experience in film, animation, or digital content production



Tools & Technology



Proficiency in design and creative tools (Adobe Creative Suite or similar)

Experience with AI tools (Midjourney, DALL·E, Runway, etc.)

Familiarity with video editing and motion graphics is a plus



Leadership & Collaboration



Proven ability to lead creative projects and guide teams

Strong communication and collaboration skills

Experience working with cross-functional teams (marketing, production, technical)



Mindset



Creative thinker with a passion for innovation and experimentation

Ability to balance creative vision with strategic objectives

Self-motivated and adaptable in a fast-paced environment



Why This Role is Unique



This role is ideal for someone who can blend creativity, strategy, and emerging AI tools—leading the next generation of visual storytelling and creative production.



Application Instructions:

Please complete the attached application form and submit it along with your CV:

title: Strategic Alibaba Sourcing & Procurement Specialist
description:
We are looking for an experienced Sourcing & Procurement Specialist to handle our supply chain operations on Alibaba. Your main goal is to find the best manufacturers, negotiate the best possible terms, and ensure that every product that leaves China meets our high-quality standards.



You will report directly to our Operations Manager and work closely with the CEO.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Supplier Vetting: Identify and verify manufacturers on Alibaba (avoiding trading companies/middlemen).



Negotiation: Negotiate pricing, MOQs (Minimum Order Quantities), and payment terms (aiming for 30/70 splits via Trade Assurance).



Sample Management: Coordinate sample production and shipping to ensure they meet specifications.



Quality Control: Arrange third-party inspections and ensure all production issues are fixed before final payment.



Logistics Coordination: Work with freight forwarders to ensure timely delivery and correct documentation.



Required Qualifications:



Min 2-3 years of experience specifically in Alibaba sourcing for international markets.



Expertise in Trade Assurance, Incoterms (EXW, FOB, DDP), and factory audits.



Deep understanding of Quality Control (QC) processes.



Strong negotiation skills – you must be comfortable pushing back on suppliers to get better deals.



Highly organized with a "never trust, always verify" mindset.



Why Work With Us?



Stable, long-term full-time role.



Professional growth within a scaling e-commerce business.



Clear management structure (you will have a dedicated Operations Manager to support you).



HOW TO APPLY:



Change the subject line of your application to: "Master Sourcing Agent for Aromika".



List 3 specific "Red Flags" you look for when checking a new supplier's Alibaba profile.



Explain your process for handling a situation where a batch of 500 units has a 10?fect rate during inspection.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) explaining your biggest sourcing "win" (how you saved money or improved quality).

title: Business Development Manager / Operations Architect (KPI & Team Building)
description:
Job Title: Business Development & Operations Architect (KPIs + Hiring + Systems)

The Mission:

We are a growing company with a clear vision, but we need a System Builder to create the internal engine. I am looking for a right-hand person who doesn’t just "manage" tasks but designs the organizational structure, sets the metrics for success, and hires the talent to execute it.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Organizational Design: Audit our current workflow and build a scalable team hierarchy.



KPI Management: Define, implement, and track Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for every department to ensure accountability.



Talent Acquisition: Identify gaps in our team, write job descriptions, and lead the recruitment process to hire A-players.



SOP Creation: Build a library of Standard Operating Procedures so the business can run without constant supervision.



Who You Are:



You have a proven track record of building company structures or scaling departments.



You are data-driven—you believe that if it’s not measured, it’s not managed.



You are an expert recruiter who can spot talent and culture-fit from a mile away.



You have high-level English skills and a "builder" mentality (you find solutions, not excuses).



?? PRE-INTERVIEW TEST (Follow these steps or your application will be ignored):

To ensure you have the attention to detail required for this role, please follow these instructions exactly:



Subject Line: Change your application subject to: "SYSTEM ARCHITECT - [Your Years of Management Experience]" (e.g., SYSTEM ARCHITECT - 5 Years).



The Question: In your cover letter, answer this: "If a department is underperforming, what are the first 3 metrics (KPIs) you would check to find the root cause?"



The Video: Record a 60-90 second Loom video introducing yourself and describing one specific team or system you built from scratch. (Paste the link in your application).



Tools: List the top 3 software tools you use to manage team performance and tasks.



Why Join Us?



Full-time, long-term remote position.



High level of autonomy—you design the systems.



Competitive salary based on experience and results.

title: Mozaik CNC Specialist – GC Code Optimization (Cabinet Manufacturing)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Mozaik CNC specialist to optimize and manage GC codes for cabinet production.



This is not a beginner role. You must understand cabinet construction, materials, and production flow.



Your main responsibility will be to ensure that all generated parts are accurate, optimized, and ready for production.



Responsibilities:



Optimize and manage GC Codes in Mozaik



Verify all cabinet parts before production



Control and validate:



Door styles and finishes



Box materials (plywood, MDF, etc.)



Drawer types (Blum, dovetail, etc.)



Edgebanding / decor consistency



Detect and fix errors before CNC production



Work closely with our design and production team



Improve efficiency and reduce material waste



Requirements:



Strong experience with Mozaik Software (REQUIRED)



Knowledge of cabinet construction



Understanding of:



Materials (plywood, MDF, melamine)



Cabinet parts (panels, fillers, toe kicks, etc.)



Hardware (drawers, hinges)



Experience with CNC production workflows



Attention to detail (VERY important)



Ability to work independently and communicate clearly

title: Email Automation & lead generation Specialist
description:
We are looking for a tech-savvy, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support our growing agency with lead generation and
 marketing operations. This role starts with approximately 5–10 hours per week supporting one client, with the potential to scale to 3+ clients and take over appointment setting and additional tasks (including web development and AI prompting) as the partnership grows.



This is a remote position with flexible working hours, though you must be available for occasional syncs or training during US Business Hours (PST).



Top Responsibilities:

Lead Management: Scraping, cleaning, and importing lead lists into our systems.

Campaign Execution: Setting up and managing automated
 sequences in the CRM to drive engagement.

CRM Maintenance: Managing data and workflows within the CRM

Scale-Up Opportunity: Future transition into appointment setting and managing high-volume client outreach.

Social Media Scheduling: Scheduling pre-made posts (5–10 hours/month) via scheduling tools.



Requirements:

Must-Have: Experience with Hubspot or similar CRM/Email Marketing software.

Must-Have: Proficiency in Google Suite and general "tech-fluency" (the ability to learn new tools quickly).

Must-Have: High attention to detail and strong time management skills.

Nice-to-Have: Experience with Apollo, Data Axle, or lead scraping tools.

Nice-to-Have: Web administration skills (WordPress, Webflow, or Wix).

Nice-to-Have: Experience with Base44 or project management tools like 
/Trello.



Perks & Pay:

Hourly Rate: $6–$8/hour (up to $10/hour for verified experts).

Performance Bonuses: Ad hoc bonuses for excellent work.

Incentives: Future commission once appointment setting begins.

Flexibility: Work on your own schedule as long as deadlines are met.



About Us:

We are a fast-paced agency focused on delivering high-quality results for our clients. We value positive energy, direct communication via Slack/WhatsApp, and a proactive "get it done" attitude.



To Apply:

1. Change the subject line to: “I’m a hard worker [Insert the name of the CEO of Hubspot]”

2. Why are you interested in this position? (2–3 sentences max)

3. What relevant experience do you have with lead scraping and
 marketing? (3–5 sentences)

4. Provide details on your experience setting up
 marketing automation: Which tools have you mastered, and what is your strategy for turning an automated sequence into a live sales conversation?

5. Confirm you are comfortable starting at 5–10 hours/week and can attend meetings during PST business hours.



Do not write more than requested. Applications that don’t follow this exact format will be ignored.

- Supportive and collaborative tea
mbers

title: Lead Generation Specialist
description:
DelGate Logistics is one of Canada’s fastest-growing logistics companies specializing in furniture warehousing, fulfillment, and nationwide white-glove home delivery. We work with furniture and ecommerce brands that need a reliable partner to scale across Canada.



We’re hiring a Lead Generation Specialist who’s tech-savvy, experienced, and up to date with modern lead gen strategies — someone who can consistently deliver high-quality leads that turn into real sales opportunities.



No cold calling required. This role is strictly focused on lead sourcing, research, and building clean lead lists for our sales team.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Build targeted lead lists (furniture brands, home goods, ecommerce, retail)

• Identify decision-makers (Founder, CEO, Operations, Supply Chain, Logistics)

• Find and verify accurate contact info 
 + LinkedIn + company details)

• Use modern tools to source, enrich, and segment leads

• Organize and upload leads into HubSpot CRM with clean tagging and notes

• Keep lead data clean, accurate, and ready for outbound campaigns

• Continuously improve lead quality by testing better targeting strategies



What We’re Looking For (Experience is a MUST)

You must have:

• 2+ years experience in B2B lead generation (required)

• Strong research skills and attention to detail

• Comfortable working with tools and moving fast

• Proven ability to generate qualified leads (not random lists)

• Strong written English communication

• CRM experience (HubSpot preferred)



Tools You Should Know (or Similar)

• LinkedIn Sales Navigator

• Apollo / ZoomInfo / Lusha / Seamless

• HubSpot CRM

• Google Sheets / Excel

• Lead enrichment + verification tools



What Success Looks Like

• Consistent weekly delivery of qualified leads

• Accurate data (low bounce rates, correct titles, correct contacts)

• Leads that match our ideal customer profile

• Organized CRM and clean segmentation for campaigns



How to Apply:



All interested candidates are required to submit their application exclusively through the official application form provided below.



Application Form:


/apprh2r75diWbBglL/pagwah2OzgyqXMOQ1/form

title: Social Media Manager (Multi-Brand) EST - Remote
description:
We're looking for a Social Media Manager to own content, strategy and execution across 6 brands. This is a hands-on role — you'll be responsible for growing organic presence, maintaining brand consistency, and driving real engagement across platforms.



What the Role Entails :

• Manage social media accounts across 6 distinct brands (Instagram, TikTok,
 and 
 where applicable)

• Create, schedule, and publish content consistently — including graphics, captions, reels, and stories

• Develop monthly content calendars aligned to each brand's voice and goals

• Monitor comments, DMs, and community engagement — respond in the brand’s voice. 

• Track performance metrics (reach, engagement rate, follower growth, link clicks) and report weekly

• Coordinate with brand leads to align content with campaigns, launches, and promotions

• Repurpose content across platforms to maximize output efficiency



Skills & Experience Required :

• 2+ years managing social media for a brand or agency (multi-brand experience preferred)

• Strong copywriting skills — can adapt tone across different brand voices

• Proficient in Canva (or equivalent design tools) for creating on-brand visuals

• Video editing skills for short-form content (Reels, TikToks) — CapCut, Adobe Premiere, or similar

• Solid understanding of platform algorithms, best practices, and trends

• Data-driven: comfortable pulling analytics and identifying what's working

• Highly organized — can manage multiple content calendars without dropping the ball



Tools We Use :

• Design: Canva, Adobe Creative Suite (bonus)

• Scheduling: Later, Buffer, or Meta Business Suite

• Communication: Slack

• Project management: Clickup / Google Sheets

• Analytics: Native platform insights + any reporting tools we align on



Expectations :

• Consistent daily/weekly publishing cadence across all 6 brands — no gaps

• Proactive ideation: bring content ideas, don't wait to be told what to post

• Fast turnaround on urgent content needs (24–48 hrs)

• Weekly performance summary is shared every Monday

• Clear communication if capacity is stretched — no silent drops

title: Amazon Listing and SEO Specialist (Part-Time) / Remote

title: Marketing Automation Specialist (AI and Workflow Systems)
description:
On the Performance & Automation team, the Marketing Automation Specialist (AI & Workflow Systems) will design, build, and optimize automation workflows that improve marketing operations, reporting, and decision-making across the agency.



This role sits at the intersection of marketing, systems thinking, and AI. You will focus on translating business logic and performance marketing needs into scalable automation systems using tools such as n8n, Make, and Zapier.



In this remote role, you will work closely with the CEO and performance team to connect data sources, streamline workflows, and build intelligent systems that enhance speed, accuracy, and overall client impact.





About Us

Rubix is a performance marketing consultancy focused on helping high-growth DTC brands scale profitably. We combine deep analytics, strategic media buying, and a growing layer of AI-powered automation to help our clients—and ourselves—move faster, smarter, and leaner.



We are evolving into an AI-first consultancy, building systems that turn data into decisions. Our approach is grounded in ownership, accountability, and continuous experimentation to drive measurable growth.



At Rubix, we don’t just execute campaigns—we build infrastructure that scales performance.





You Will

Automation & Workflow Development

- Build and maintain automation workflows using low/no-code tools such as n8n, Make, and Zapier

- Design systems that connect marketing platforms and trigger automated actions based on performance data

- Translate business and marketing requirements into scalable automation logic





Data Integration & Systems Design

- Connect platforms such as Meta Ads, Google Ads, Klaviyo, Shopify, and reporting tools to centralize data

- Develop structured workflows that ensure consistent, reliable data flow across systems

- Design and maintain dashboards and alert systems to monitor KPIs and campaign performance





AI & Process Optimization

- Leverage AI tools such as ChatGPT and Claude to assist in reporting, summarization, and insight generation

- Identify operational bottlenecks and implement automation-driven solutions

- Continuously explore and implement new tools and systems to improve efficiency and output





Collaboration & Execution

- Work closely with media buyers and strategists to implement automations that improve campaign feedback loops

- Translate technical workflows into clear, business-friendly outputs

- Support cross-functional execution by ensuring systems align with marketing objectives





You Have

- 3+ years of experience in marketing operations, automation, or systems-focused roles

- Hands-on experience with automation platforms such as n8n, Make, or Zapier

- Strong understanding of API concepts and integration logic

- Familiarity with performance marketing platforms such as Meta Ads, Google Ads, Klaviyo, and Shopify

- Experience working with Google Sheets, Airtable, or similar toolsStrong understanding of marketing metrics such as ROAS, CPA, CAC, and LTV

- Ability to interpret marketing data and translate it into actionable workflows

- Strong written and verbal English communication skills





We Prefer

- Experience working in performance marketing agencies or high-growth environments

- Familiarity with tools such as 
 or similar data aggregation platforms

- Basic knowledge of Python or deeper API integrations

-  Experience building reporting systems, dashboards, or alert frameworks

- Experience leveraging AI tools to enhance workflows, reporting, or decision-making

- Strong curiosity and habit of staying up to date with trends in AI, automation, and marketing systems





Compensation

Compensation for this role will be based on experience, technical expertise, and scope of responsibilities. 



We are open to both full-time and fractional engagements (~30+ hours per week) and will align on a structure that reflects the value you bring.



This is a remote role with a strong preference for candidates based in Latin America and requires 4–5 hours overlap with EST.



At Rubix, you will work closely with leadership in a high-ownership environment where speed, clarity, and initiative are valued. This role offers the opportunity to build impactful systems, shape internal infrastructure, and play a key role in the evolution of an AI-first performance marketing organization.

title: Chapter 11 Legal Assistant
description:
About Us: We are a fast-growing U.S. law firm focused on helping individuals and businesses get a fresh start through bankruptcy. We handle high-level Chapter 11 cases and are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented tea
mber to join us long-term. This is not a basic admin role — this is a critical position that works directly with financial documents, attorneys, and clients.



Why This Role is Different: This is a long-term, stable position with a clear growth path into senior roles. You will receive direct training from our experienced U.S. legal team, gain valuable financial and legal experience, and take ownership of real cases rather than just completing tasks.



Position Overview: You will be responsible for managing Monthly Operating Reports (MORs), reviewing financial documents, coordinating with clients, and helping keep Chapter 11 cases on track. This role requires someone who is highly detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable reviewing bank statements and financial reports.



Core Responsibilities: Manage Monthly and Quarterly Operating Reports by collecting documents starting on the 1st of each month and following up with clients on the 10th, 15th, and 20th; review bank statements for inconsistencies or unusual transactions and request explanations from clients when needed; compare MORs against bank statements to ensure accuracy and proper balancing; review MORs to confirm all questions are answered correctly; attach all required financial documents for business cases and prepare cash receipt and disbursement reports for individuals; track deadlines and enforce compliance, including sending late notices after the 21st and escalation
s if documents are not received within 48 hours; coordinate attorney review prior to filing and file MORs and QORs while maintaining an accurate tracking system. Handle client communication by following up persistently to ensure timely document submission, sending escalation notices when needed, and eventually leading client onboarding and instruction calls once trained. Assist with fee applications by preparing interim and final applications, coordinating with accounting after fee approvals, and ensuring clients receive copies and hearing notices. Support new Chapter 11 case setup by scheduling initial meetings with attorneys, setting up client folders, sending intake forms and document requests, following up until all required documents are received, and confirming required insurance coverage prior to filing. Provide administrative support by scheduling client calls, petition reviews, and follow-ups, scheduling 341 meeting preparation calls, and handling mailings and address updates.



What We’re Looking For: Strong understanding of financial documents such as bank statements and basic reports; extremely detail-oriented and organized; excellent written English and professional communication skills; ability to follow structured processes and meet deadlines; comfortable managing multiple cases at once; proactive mindset with strong follow-up habits.



Bonus (Not Required): Experience in accounting, bookkeeping, or finance; experience working with U.S. law firms; familiarity with bankruptcy or legal processes.



KPIs for Success: Percentage of MORs and QORs filed on time; client response turnaround time; error rate in filings; number of follow-ups required per client; accuracy of financial reconciliation.



Compensation & Growth: Competitive salary based on experience with opportunities for performance-based increases; long-term role with growth into a senior case manager position; ongoing training and increased responsibility over time.



How to Apply: Please include a short introduction describing your experience with financial documents, an example of a task where you reviewed or reconciled numbers, and your internet speed and home office setup.



Quick Note: We are looking for someone who takes ownership, follows through, and takes pride in getting things right. If that sounds like you, this can become a long-term and rewarding role with our firm.

title: Customer Success Manager (Digital Marketing SaaS)
description:
About Us



We are a leading SaaS loyalty, marketing, and customer engagement platform serving retailers and brands across highly regulated industries in the U.S. and Canada. We help businesses strengthen customer relationships through data-driven marketing, automation, and analytics—driving retention, growth, and revenue.



We are seeking a highly proactive Account Manager / Customer Success Manager to own and grow a portfolio of mid-market and SMB retail clients. This is a commercially focused role responsible for driving platform adoption, retention, and revenue expansion while serving as the primary strategic advisor to clients.



The ideal candidate has experience in digital marketing or loyalty SaaS platforms and is comfortable leading ROI-driven conversations that connect campaign performance to business outcomes. This role requires a consultative, data-driven professional who can proactively mitigate churn risk and guide customers toward long-term success.







What You'll Do



- Own and manage a portfolio of approximately
SMB and mid-market retail accounts, serving as the primary relationship owner.

-Drive retention, renewals, and revenue growth through proactive account management and expansion opportunities.

- Lead monthly ROI and performance conversations, connecting
, SMS, and loyalty campaign metrics to business outcomes.

- Proactively monitor account health, identify churn risks early, and execute mitigation plans before renewal cycles.

- Guide customers on digital marketing best practices, campaign optimization, and platform adoption strategies.

- Conduct regular business reviews focused on engagement metrics, click-through rates, and revenue impact.

- Perform root cause analysis on escalations and partner cross-functionally to drive resolution and continuous improvement.

- Act as a trusted advisor to retail clients, delivering a highly consultative customer experience.

- Maintain accurate forecasting, account documentation, and CRM hygiene (Salesforce or similar).



What We're Looking For



- 4+ years in Customer Success, Account Management, or Client Services within a SaaS environment.

- Strong preference for experience with digital marketing,
/SMS platforms, or loyalty technology (e.g., Klaviyo, Iterable, or similar).

- Experience supporting retail or SMB customers is highly preferred.

- Proven ability to drive adoption, retention, and expansion within an existing book of business.

- Strong understanding of marketing performance metrics such as engagement rates, click-through rates, and campaign ROI.

- Demonstrated success in proactive churn mitigation and escalation management, including root cause analysis.

- Highly consultative mindset with the ability to guide customers on best practices and growth opportunities.

- Excellent English communication skills with polished video presence and strong active listening abilities.

- Comfortable managing a high-volume portfolio in a fast-paced SaaS environment.

- Hands-on experience with CRM tools (Salesforce preferred).

- Reliable primary internet plus backup connection required due to heavy video-based client interactions.



Work Setup & Compensation:



- Schedule: Follows U.S. business hours as needed

- Location: Remote in the Philippines

- Rate: Hourly in USD



**Please include a link to your resume and short-introduction video in your message**

title: Short-Form Video Editor for Social Media Ads (Long-Term Work)
description:

If you’re consistent, detail-oriented, and can match a specific editing style, we’d love to see your work.







???? Please read the full job description below and complete the test edit to apply:

About Strehl Media

We work with industries like roofing, HVAC, construction, and other local service businesses that want to become the best-known brand in their market.

Our content is designed to generate leads, build authority, and drive real business results, not just views.

title: Video Editor - Meta Ads/VSL
description:
Hi, I’m Zebbi.



I’m not looking for a video editor who just cuts clips together. I’m looking for someone who understands marketing — someone who knows why a clip is used, not just how to place it.



We’re a small but serious Italian team selling a niche health product in the US. We’re 6 guys, 22 to 27 years old, and if we work together, you’ll mostly be working directly with me, the head editor.

Right now we mainly produce VSLs (usually 5–7 minutes, sometimes shorter or longer) and some UGC-style ads. The main goal is conversion on Meta ads.



---



What we need is: 

- strong clip selection, 

- clean editing, 

- subtitles, 

- sound effects, 

- simple transitions when needed, 

- and most importantly someone who is creative but also thoughtful. 

- You need to understand the script and make smart editing choices, not just execute. 

- Some familiarity with AI is also important since we’re integrating it more and more into the workflow.



We work with clear briefs and clear instructions, but this is important: you won’t just assemble clips. You’ll need to think, make decisions, and sometimes find the right footage yourself. A lot of material will be in our drive, but not everything.

Workload depends on the period. Right now it’s around 1–2 videos per week, usually around 5 minutes each. When we scale, it can go up to 4–5 videos per week. Payment is per video, paid weekly or monthly depending on what you prefer.

You can find the detailed payment structure here (rates increase as you improve):



There is real room for growth and stability here for the right person.



---



Step 1 — Answer these questions (If you don't answer all the questions, we won't contact you.):



1) Which AI tools are you familiar with, and which ones do you currently use or have used in your workflow?

2) What kind of ads have you edited the most: VSLs, UGC, direct response ads, brand ads, or something else?

3) How fast can you usually deliver a 5–7 minute VSL if the brief is clear? We’re looking for a simple edit, but well thought-out and intentional.

4) Send 2–3 examples of ads you edited that you think are your strongest work.



---



Step 2 — Test task (important):



We ask you to edit a main video of around 1:15 plus 6 hooks.



Brief Link: 

In the brief you’ll find basically everything you need to know. If you have any doubts, feel free to ask me anything.



Also, when do you think you would deliver the video?



---



Once you send it, we’ll review the work carefully. If needed, we may ask for revisions. Then we’ll test it on Meta and evaluate both the quality of the edit and how it performs.

If you’re just looking for random editing gigs, this is probably not for you.

If you’re hungry, smart, fast, and want to grow into a killer direct-response editor, there could be a real opportunity here.



Send your answers and start the test when ready.

title: Klaviyo Flow Specialist (PH Based)
description:
Position Overview



We’re looking for a Klaviyo Flow Specialist who can own the strategy, buildout, and optimization of automated
 flows for our portfolio of Shopify-based DTC clients. You’ll be responsible for mapping customer journeys, building segmentation, setting up flows from scratch, and ensuring every automation is performance-optimized and on-brand.



Requirements/Experience:



- 2+ years of hands-on experience working in Klaviyo



- Deep understanding of customer lifecycle and retention marketing for eCommerce brands



- Strong technical skills within Klaviyo: automation logic, segmentation, A/B testing, dynamic blocks, triggers, working with their support team, etc.



- Experience building and optimizing flows like: Welcome, Abandoned Cart, Checkout, Browse Abandonment, Post-Purchase, Win-back, and Loyalty flows



- Strong experience with Shopify, including how to use event data and customer properties in Klaviyo



- Ability to develop strategy and confidently present flow audits and recommendations



- Experience collaborating with copywriters and designers to bring flows to life



- Strong understanding of KPIs like open rates, CTR, revenue per flow, and deliverability



- Detail-oriented and comfortable managing multiple client accounts at once



Common Traits We Are Seeking:



- Technical thinker with creative instincts



- Deeply organized and meticulous with quality control



- Self-motivated and able to take initiative without constant oversight



- Comfortable working within a larger retention team 
 marketers, designers, copywriters)



- Clear communicator who can explain strategy and logic to internal teams and clients



- Enjoys identifying inefficiencies and turning them into optimized automations



Our Core Values



- Uncompromising Excellence

- Extreme Ownership

- Integrity Above All

- Results Driven Focus



Roles & Responsibilities for this position:



- Build, launch, and optimize
 flows in Klaviyo across multiple DTC brands



- Own the entire customer journey via
 automations - from strategy to execution



- Develop segmentation strategies and conditional logic to create personalized experiences



- Conduct account audits and implement best practices to increase performance



- Partner with copywriters and designers to ensure content aligns with strategy



- Monitor and report on performance regularly, providing strategic recommendations



- Troubleshoot issues within Klaviyo and proactively improve deliverability and flow efficiency



- Stay current with Klaviyo updates, industry trends, and platform capabilities



Apply today to join our team!



Notes:



Candidates must be available to work Central Standard Time (CST) business hours.

Schedule: Full-time

Target Start Date: ASAP

title: ELITE VIDEO EDITOR
description:
ELITE VSL VIDEO EDITOR WANTED



We need ONE world-class VSL Direct Response editor for our D2C E-commerce brand.



- THE OPPORTUNITY:



Position: Direct Response VSL Video Editor (Health/Pain Relief Specialist)

Commitment: Long-term creative partnership (not freelance)

Compensation: $1,200-$1,500 monthly + performance bonuses

Location: 100% Remote & Flexible

Hours: 40h/week

Market: English-speaking



- HERE'S WHAT MAKES THIS DIFFERENT:



While other companies treat editors like replaceable contractors, we're building an elite creative partnership. You'll own a piece of our explosive growth.



Your Monthly Earnings Potential:



Base Salary: $1,000-$1,500

+ Performance Bonuses, based on VSL conversion rates

+ Annual Increases: 10-20% year-over-year growth for strong performance



- THE MISSION:



Transform Pain Into Freedom. We don't just sell products. We literally change lives.



- WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR (BE HONEST, WE'LL VERIFY)



MUST-HAVE Experience:



2+ years Direct Response VSL editing (health/pain relief preferred)

Proven track record with 5+ minute retention-focused VSL's

Advanced motion graphics & 3D animation skills

AI video tool experience (Veo V3, HeyGen, etc.)

Proficiency: CapCut, Premiere Pro, or After Effects



STRONG PREFERENCE:



Understanding of pain relief marketing psychology

/Instagram ad optimization knowledge

Medical/health content editing background



- WHAT SETS YOU APART:



You understand that every cut, transition, and overlay affects conversion rates

You obsess over scene-script matching (e.g., "cervical spine" = 3D neck animation)

You add red pain indicators, motion effects, and retention hooks instinctively

You study successful health VSLs to understand winning patterns



ATTENTION:



We receive 50+ applications per post. Only 2-3 get interviews.



What makes the difference?



Portfolio quality over quantity

Demonstrable health niche experience

Understanding of Direct Response psychology

Genuine passion for helping people escape pain



Warning: We move fast. The best candidates often get hired within a week of applying.?



Start your proposal with "DOMINATE" so we know you’ve read the full description.

title: Full-Time Virtual Assistant for U.S. Home Service Company (Phone, CRM, Scheduling, Estimates)
description:
We are a fast-growing drywall repair company based in Tucson, Arizona (The Patch Boys of Greater Tucson), and we are looking for a highly organized and professional Virtual Assistant to support our daily operations.



This is a full-time, long-term position with growth opportunities.



You will play a key role in handling customer communication, managing leads, scheduling jobs, and keeping our systems organized.



Responsibilities:



Answer inbound phone calls from customers



Respond to new leads (calls, texts, online inquiries) within minutes



Enter and manage customer information in our CRM (Jobber)



Schedule estimates and jobs efficiently



Assist in preparing and sending estimates



Follow up with customers on pending estimates



Rate and categorize incoming leads (Google LSA calls)



Communicate with customers via phone, SMS, and



Maintain clear and detailed notes in CRM



Organize job photos and files in Google Drive



Create before-and-after photo collages for marketing



What We’re Looking For:



Excellent English communication (spoken and written)



Comfortable answering phone calls (this is REQUIRED)



Strong organization and attention to detail



Ability to follow systems and processes



Fast response time and sense of urgency



Experience with CRM tools (Jobber preferred, but not required)



Reliable internet and quiet work environment



Working Hours:



Monday – Friday

8:30 AM – 5:00 PM MST (Arizona Time)

Includes 30-minute lunch break



Tools You’ll Use:



Jobber (CRM)



Google Drive



Gmail



ChatGPT



Google Sheets



Important:



This role requires quick response times and strong customer service skills. You will often be the first point of contact for our customers.



How to Apply:



Please include the following in your application:



A short introduction about yourself



Your experience with phone support and CRM systems



A voice recording introducing yourself (REQUIRED)



The word “DRYWALL” at the top of your application so we know you read this



Bonus Points If You Have:



Experience in home services or construction industry



Experience with Jobber or similar CRM



Experience creating marketing graphics or photo collages



Compensation:



Based on experience (hourly or salary)

Opportunity for bonuses based on performance

We are a fast-growing real estate media company focused on delivering high-quality, story-driven content for real estate agents, builders, and brands. We are looking for a full-time remote video editor who can consistently produce polished, engaging video content.



This is a production-focused role. You will be editing daily and expected to maintain both speed and quality.

- Edit premium real estate listing videos (cinematic, MLS, luxury walkthroughs)

- Collaborate with tea
mbers and implement feedback
