- Experience using MotionVFX plugins

- Strong understanding of:

- Story pacing and structure

- Short-form content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

- Familiarity with 
, Dropbox, or similar tools

- Portfolio (must include talking-head and short-form content)

title: Google Ads Assistant
description:
We're a fast-scaling DTC ecommerce brand doing 8 figures in revenue. We're looking for a Google Ads Specialist to own and optimize our paid search and shopping campaigns. This is a hands-on, execution-heavy role. You'll be in the account daily, making decisions that directly impact revenue. If you thrive on data, move fast, and want to work with a high-performance team -- this is for you.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:



- Build, manage, and optimize Google Ads campaigns across Search, Shopping, Performance Max, Display, and YouTube

- Monitor daily spend, ROAS, CPA, and conversion metrics -- flag issues before they become problems

- Conduct keyword research, build out ad groups, write ad copy, and manage negative keyword lists

- Set up and manage Performance Max campaigns including asset groups, audience signals, and feed optimization

- Manage Google Merchant Center -- troubleshoot feed errors, optimize product titles and descriptions for Shopping performance

- A/B test ad copy, landing pages, bidding strategies, and audience segments

- Build and maintain campaign reporting dashboards (Google Sheets, Looker Studio, or similar)

- Provide weekly performance reports with clear insights and action items -- not just numbers

- Collaborate with the creative and marketing team on ad assets, landing page recommendations, and promotional campaign setup

- Stay current on Google Ads platform updates, beta features, and best practices





REQUIREMENTS:



- Minimum 2 years hands-on experience managing Google Ads for ecommerce (DTC preferred)

- Proven experience with Performance Max, Shopping, and Search campaigns

- Strong understanding of Google Merchant Center and product feed optimization

- Comfortable with data -- you can pull insights from Google Ads, GA4, and Google Sheets without hand-holding

- Experience with bid strategies (tROAS, tCPA, Max Conversions) and knowing when to use which

- Ability to manage budgets ranging from $10K-$100K+/month

- Strong written English -- you'll be writing ad copy and communicating with the team daily

- Self-starter who doesn't need to be micromanaged -- you see a problem, you fix it





NICE TO HAVE:



- Experience with Shopify-based ecommerce brands

- Familiarity with Meta Ads or TikTok Ads (cross-channel understanding)

- Experience with Google Ads scripts or automated rules

- Knowledge of attribution modeling and how Google fits into a multi-channel media mix

- Google Ads certification





WORK SETUP:



- Full-time position

- Remote

- Must be available during US business hours for team communication and reporting

- Salary: [FILL IN]





HOW TO APPLY:



Send your resume along with a video explaining the follow to 
 

1. A brief summary of the Google Ads accounts you've managed (monthly spend, ROAS, industry)

2. One specific example of a campaign you optimized and the results you achieved

3. Your experience level with Performance Max and Shopping campaigns

title: **Photo Editor + Instagram Reels Creator – Photography Studio**
description:
**Photo Editor + Instagram Reels Creator – Photography Studio**

**Location:** Remote

**Pay:** $4–$6/hr depending on experience

**Type:** Part-time, Long-term



---



**About the Role**



I run a professional photography studio in New Jersey specializing in corporate headshots, portraits, and weddings.



I’m looking for a reliable assistant who can handle both Instagram Reels creation and photo editing support — and switch between the two depending on workload.



You must be able to follow instructions closely, work efficiently, and deliver consistent results.



---



**Main Responsibilities**



**Social Media Content (Primary)**



* Create Instagram Reels from raw photo/video clips

* Select strong clips and build engaging short-form content

* Add cuts, pacing, and simple captions

* Execute hooks and edits based on direction



**Photo Editing Support (Secondary)**



* Lightroom color correction (exposure, white balance, cropping)

* Basic retouching using Evoto or Photoshop

* Wedding culling assistance when needed (Aftershoot)

* File organization and delivery prep



---



**Required Skills**



* Adobe Lightroom

* Experience editing photos of people (portraits or weddings)

* CapCut or similar video editing software

* Experience creating Instagram Reels or short-form content



---



**Bonus Skills**



* Photoshop or Evoto

* Aftershoot

* Wedding editing experience



---



**Work Structure**



When editing work is available, you will focus on photo editing and culling.

When editing is light, you will focus on Reels and social media content.



Workload varies week to week, so flexibility is important.



---



**How to Apply**



**Start your application with the word CONTENTEDITOR or it will not be reviewed.**



Then include:



1. A short introduction about your background

2. Examples of Reels or short-form videos you’ve created

3. Before/after photo editing samples (people only — no landscapes)

4. What software you used in your last editing job and what style you were asked to match

5. Any wedding editing or culling experience

6. Your hourly rate



---



**Important:**

Applications without examples or missing the keyword will be ignored.

title: Full-Time Social Media Manager
description:

We are hiring a full-time Social Media Lead to own and execute content across multiple brands within our portfolio.



This is not a side gig.

This is not an agency role.

This is a high-ownership position for someone who wants to build, scale, and eventually lead.



Important Notes (Read Carefully)



This is a full-time (40 hours/week) role



You must be available during U.S. working hours



This is not open to agencies or freelancers



This role is designed to grow into a leadership position, with content creators and editors reporting to you



What You’ll Be Responsible For



Managing and growing multiple social media accounts across our brands



Planning and executing content calendars



Creating and/or coordinating high-quality content (short-form, reels, posts, etc.)



Publishing, optimizing, and engaging across platforms



Running and optimizing Meta 
/Instagram) ads



Turning attention into real conversions and revenue



We are not looking for someone who just posts.

We are looking for someone who understands how content drives business.



What We’re Looking For



Strong experience with content creation tools and social platforms



Proven ability to grow accounts and drive engagement



Experience running paid social campaigns that convert



Organized, proactive, and able to manage multiple brands at once



Someone who wants to build something long-term, not just complete tasks



To Apply, You Must Include:



Your requested weekly salary for a full-time role



A clear statement confirming this is a full-time commitment (not freelance/agency work)



Examples of your work and experience managing social media accounts



Growth Opportunity



We are a fast-growing company with multiple brands scaling aggressively.



As we grow:



Your compensation will grow



Your responsibility will expand

Our wins = your wins.

If you want to own the outcome, drive growth, and build something meaningful, we want to hear from you.

title: VSL VIDEO EDITOR — LONG-TERM PARTNERSHIP (E-commerce D2C)
description:
Let me be upfront with you, because that's how we operate.



We're a D2C e-commerce brand in the women's health space. We sell a product that genuinely helps people, and every piece of content we produce reflects that. No misleading claims. No bait-and-switch.



We're into a 5-year vision. We're scaling aggressively in the English-speaking market, and we need editors who grow with us, not editors who disappear when a bigger project comes along, and not a company that goes quiet after 3 months because the brand didn't work out.



We're in this for the long game. We want you to be too.



- THE ROLE:



Position: Direct Response VSL Video Editor (Health/Pain Relief Specialist)

Commitment: Full-time, long-term (this is not a freelance gig)

Compensation: $1,000-$1,500 monthly + performance bonuses

Location: 100% remote

Hours: 40h/week

Market: English-speaking



- WHAT LONG-TERM ACTUALLY MEANS HERE:



- Year-over-year salary increases of 10–20% for strong performers

- Performance bonuses tied directly to VSL and ad conversion rates

- Creative ownership, you won't be executing someone else's vision blindly. You'll understand the strategy, the avatar, the psychology behind every piece of content

- A real team, you'll work closely with the founder and marketing lead, not get lost in a ticket queue



- WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:



Non-negotiable:



- 2+ years editing Direct Response VSLs ads (health/women's wellness a strong plus)

- Proven retention, you understand why a cut happens at second 4, not just how to make it

- Proficiency in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or After Effects

- Experience with AI video tools (HeyGen, Veo, etc.)



Strong preference:



- You've edited ads that actually ran and converted

- You understand
/Instagram ad formats and platform behavior

- You've worked with health or wellness brands and know the compliance landscape



- WHO THRIVES HERE:



You care about the work beyond the deliverable. You watch your edited videos after they go live and wonder how to make the next one better. You understand that a 3-second hook isn't decoration, it's the difference between a winning creative and a dead one.



You want to be part of something being built, not just service it.



- WHO THIS IS NOT FOR:



If you're looking to freelance across 6 clients simultaneously, this isn't the right fit. We want someone who is genuinely invested in one brand's growth, because that's where the real upside is.



- THE PROCESS:



We review every application carefully. Portfolio quality matters far more than volume. If your work is strong and your approach is right, you'll hear from us within a week.



We move fast, but we don't rush the decision on people.



Start your application with the word "FOUNDATION", it tells us you read this and you understand what we're actually building.4

title: Medical Billing & Revenue Cycle Manager (LEAD ROLE)
description:
Job Overview



We are looking for a highly experienced Medical Billing & Revenue Cycle Consultant to support healthcare practices in optimizing their billing operations, improving cash flow, and resolving accounts receivable challenges.



This is a high-level, expert role suited for someone who can both execute and lead—an individual capable of stepping into complex billing environments, identifying gaps, implementing solutions, and training tea
mbers or virtual assistants. The role also has potential to help build and scale a future billing service line.



Key Responsibilities



Assess and optimize end-to-end revenue cycle workflows (billing, collections, AR management)



Identify bottlenecks and implement strategies to improve collections and cash flow



Manage and reduce outstanding accounts receivable (AR)



Provide hands-on support and consulting for active billing issues and stalled processes



Develop standard operating procedures (SOPs) for billing and revenue cycle functions



Train and mentor virtual assistants or administrative staff on billing processes



Advise on best practices for scaling billing operations or building a billing function



Collaborate with leadership on strategic direction for revenue cycle services



Qualifications



Proven experience in medical billing and revenue cycle management (end-to-end)



Strong understanding of insurance claims, AR follow-ups, denials, and collections



Experience working with small to mid-sized healthcare practices preferred



Demonstrated leadership or consulting experience



Ability to analyze workflows and implement practical, scalable solutions



Excellent communication and training skills



Highly reliable, with strong ownership and accountability



Ideal Candidate



Strategic thinker who can also execute tactically



Comfortable working in early-stage or unstructured environments



Strong leadership presence with the ability to guide and train others



Interested in helping build and shape a potential new service line



Engagement Scope



Project-based engagement with flexible hours



Opportunity to transition into a longer-term or expanded role based on performance and business needs



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys solving complex billing challenges, driving real financial impact for healthcare practices, and contributing to the foundation of a scalable revenue cycle operation.

title: AI-First Performance Graphic Designer
description:
We’re looking for an AI-First Performance Graphic Designer to own the creation of high-converting static ads for our e-commerce clients.



In this role, AI is a core part of your workflow — not a novelty. You’ll use it to generate bespoke assets, enhance product photography, and rapidly iterate on winning concepts. You should be able to move from a strategic brief to a polished, on-brand ad quickly and consistently.



We’re a high-output, performance-minded team that moves fast, tests constantly, and improves through iteration. If you’re the type of designer who loves shipping work, learning what wins, and leveling up quickly — you’ll thrive here.



This role starts part-time, but the goal is to ramp quickly. For the right person, this can turn into a long-term, high-trust position with meaningful growth and very strong compensation.





Schedule





Initial Phase: 20 hours/week (Part-time)

 Growth Phase: Ramp to 40 hours/week (Full-time) as workload and account ownership increase

 (Typical ramp timeline: 4–8 weeks depending on performance and volume.)



Key Responsibilities





1) AI Asset Generation & Engineering

Prompt Mastery: Use tools like Midjourney, DALL·E, and/or Adobe Firefly to generate high-quality product backgrounds, lifestyle environments, and visual elements that look premium and realistic.

AI Retouching & Expansion: Use AI tools (Generative Fill, outpainting, upscaling tools like Magnific, etc.) to:

enhance low-resolution product imagery

remove unwanted objects

expand backgrounds naturally

generate clean lifestyle placements

Style & Persona Variation: Create multiple “worlds” or personas for the same product (ex: minimal luxury vs. sporty vs. cozy home) to test what resonates with different customer segments.









2) High-Performance Ad Design

Direct Response Static Ads: Design scroll-stopping paid social statics (Meta/TikTok) including:

Benefit-led product statics

UGC overlay style ads

“Us vs. Them” comparisons

Feature/ingredient callouts

Press-style listicles and credibility layouts

Brand Integrity: Ensure AI-generated imagery matches each client’s brand identity — color palette, typography, composition, tone, and overall aesthetic.

Multi-Channel Assets: Create supporting visual assets when needed (landing pages,
, Pinterest, etc.).

Typography & Layout Excellence: Use strong hierarchy, spacing, contrast, and clarity so the ad is instantly skimmable and drives toward a clear CTA.









3) Data-Driven Iteration

Rapid Versioning: When something works, you can quickly create 5–10 high-quality variations (background swaps, new hooks, layout changes, alternate offer framing) to scale the winner.

Feedback Loops: Work closely with Creative Strategists and Media Buyers to make performance-based edits using real data (CTR, CVR, CPA, ROAS).









What You’ll Need (Ordered by Importance)

? AI Workflow Mastery





 AI must be a core part of your process. You should be able to show examples where AI materially improved speed and output quality.

? Design Software Excellence





 Strong command of:

Figma (layout + fast production)

Photoshop (image manipulation + polishing)

? Paid Social / DTC Experience (2+ years)





 You’ve designed ads for e-commerce brands and understand the difference between:

what looks “nice”

 vs.

what actually converts

? Conversion-Driven Design Thinking





 You understand hooks, messaging hierarchy, visual emphasis, and how to build ads that win attention in-feed.

? Speed + Reliability





 You can produce high volume without the work becoming sloppy or inconsistent.

? Clear Communication





 Great written and spoken English — you can handle feedback, ask smart questions, and move quickly async.What Success Looks Like

Predictable Output: You consistently deliver a high volume of strong creative weekly.

 Premium Quality: AI imagery looks believable, polished, and on-brand.

 Performance Mindset: Your work is built for results and improves through iteration.

 Efficiency: You continuously sharpen your workflow and shorten time from brief ? export.









How to Apply

Please send the following:

Portfolio link (must include paid social ad creatives)

2–3 examples where you used AI as part of the workflow. Briefly explain what tool(s) you used and why









Shortlisted candidates will be given a short paid test project (60–90 minutes) to evaluate speed, taste, and conversion-focused execution.

title: Remote Inside Sales Agent (Full-Time, PST Hours)
description:
**Work From Anywhere | Join a Fast-Growing Real Estate Investment Firm**



Are you a persuasive communicator who thrives in inside sales? Do you enjoy qualifying leads, setting high-quality appointments, and driving deals forward through consistent follow-up?



If you’re looking for a long-term remote career with a company that values growth, accountability, and integrity — this opportunity is for you.



About the Role

Position: Inside Sales Agent (ISA)

Location: Anywhere – 100% Remote

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM–5:00 PM Pacific Time

(Occasional weekend work up to 4 hours)

Work Hours: 40 hours/week



As an Inside Sales Agent, you’ll be the frontline sales professional responsible for handling inbound and outbound leads, qualifying motivated sellers, and setting appointments for our acquisitions team. You’ll play a critical role in driving revenue by ensuring only high-quality opportunities move forward.



You’ll work closely with a supportive, performance-driven team that values consistency, ownership, and continuous improvement.



Qualifications & Requirements 

* Minimum 6 months of experience as an Inside Sales Agent (REQUIRED)

* Experience handling high-volume inbound and outbound calls

* Background in real estate, wholesaling, acquisitions, or property sales is a strong plus

* Proven ability to qualify leads, uncover motivation, and handle objections

* Confident, professional, and persuasive phone presence

* Excellent English communication skills (clear, neutral accent preferred)

* Strong follow-up skills and ability to nurture leads over time

* Comfortable working with CRM systems, dialers, and lead management tools

* Highly organized, detail-oriented, and consistent with data entry and notes

* Self-motivated, reliable, and able to hit daily/weekly call and appointment targets

* Team-oriented mindset with a strong sense of accountability

* Positive attitude and genuine interest in building rapport and long-term relationships





Technical Requirements

* Reliable high-speed internet (minimum 50 Mbps) with backup connection

* Reliable laptop/desktop and smartphone

* Quiet, distraction-free workspace suitable for sales calls





About SV Ventures

SV Ventures is a California-based real estate investment firm specializing in residential fix-and-flip projects and new construction throughout the Bay Area. We manage the full lifecycle — acquisitions, design, renovations, and financing — and we’re growing rapidly.



Our culture is built on strong core values:

-Growth Mindset – We learn, adapt, and improve continuously

-Accountability – We take ownership and deliver results

-Relationships – We build trust through every interaction

-Transparency – We value honesty, integrity, and clear communication



If these values resonate with you, you’ll feel right at home here.



Compensation & Benefits

-Hourly Rate: $6–8/hour (based on experience)

-3th Month Pay Bonus (with the opportunity to earn beyond for exceptional performance)

-Property Sale Bonus: $50 per property sold (Average: 12–20 properties per year)

-Bi-weekly Pay

-Long-term, stable remote position with growth opportunities





How to Apply

Please submit the following:



1. Resume (PDF or Word format)

2. Screenshot of Internet Speed Test

3. Computer Specs (make, model, RAM, storage, year of manufacture)

4. 3-minute video (Loom or YouTube only) answering:

      -Tell us about yourself — your experience, education, and why you’re a strong fit for an Inside Sales Agent role

      -What do you believe are the most important qualities of a successful Inside Sales Agent?





Ready to grow with us?

Apply now and become part of a team that values your success as much as its own.



Join SV Ventures — where growth, accountability, and opportunity meet.

 Ads and Instagram Ads). We’re looking for someone who understands how to craft scroll-stopping videos that convert. Experience with DTC ecommerce brands is a must. 



Please apply here (required): 
 



At Skinnify, we’re reinventing fitness by integrating resistance into everyday clothing. In just two years, we’ve grown from 0 to 120,000+ customers – and we’re just getting started.

Here's a video about our company and what it's like to work on our team:

Candidates must be able to deliver 5–10 creative briefs per week, covering formats from 30-second videos to 2–3+ minute VSLs



???? Why Join Skinnify?

???? Join a Hyper-Growth Brand – From 0 to 120,000+ customers in 2 years.

???? Make a Real Impact – Your edits will directly influence sales and brand growth

???? Take Ownership – You’ll have creative freedom to shape our visual style

???????? The Skinnify Story

Skinnify started when our founder Christian realized most women wanted to get in shape but lacked the time or motivation for regular workouts. After training with resistance bands, he had an idea: what if resistance bands were built into leggings?

The result? Resistance Band Leggings – leggings that make every step a workout. Since then, we’ve launched sleeves, shoes, and more. Our mission is simple: make fitness effortless by turning movement into exercise.

title: Zoho CRM & Marketing Automation Assistant (Supporting Zoho Specialist)
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION



We are looking for a highly organised and detail-oriented Zoho CRM & Marketing Automation Assistant to support our existing Zoho Specialist.



You will be working directly under our Automation Manager, who is also based in the Philippines, assisting in building and managing our CRM systems, workflows, and marketing automations.



This is an execution-focused role. You will not be responsible for strategy, but you will play a key part in building and maintaining our systems accurately and efficiently.



ABOUT US



We are a UK-based company operating within the aesthetics and medical device industry.



We work with clinics across the UK, helping them grow through advanced technology, structured systems, and long-term business support.



We are currently scaling and building out our internal CRM and automation infrastructure.



YOUR ROLE



You will support our Zoho Specialist with:



Building and setting up
 campaigns in Zoho



Uploading and formatting
 sequences



Creating and organising contact lists



Setting up workflows and basic automations



Tagging and segmenting leads correctly



Testing automation flows before going live



Supporting CRM organisation and data accuracy



Assisting with funnel and campaign setup



IMPORTANT



You will be working under a structured system.



All workflows, logic, and automation strategies will be designed by our Zoho Specialist.

Your role is to execute tasks accurately and efficiently.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



Strong attention to detail



Ability to follow clear processes and instructions



Organised and reliable



Good written English



Comfortable working with systems and data



Experience with CRM platforms (Zoho preferred but not essential)



Able to work independently once trained



BONUS (NOT ESSENTIAL)



Experience with Zoho CRM, Zoho Campaigns or Zoho Flow



Experience building
 automations or workflows



Understanding of sales funnels or lead nurturing



Previous experience supporting a marketing or automation team



WORKING STRUCTURE



You will work directly with our Zoho Specialist (Philippines-based), who works Monday to Friday, 9am–5pm



You will also support our Marketing Manager, who is based in the UK



Tasks will be assigned daily or weekly with clear systems and processes in place



WORKING HOURS



Your working hours can be flexible and may extend beyond our Zoho Specialist’s schedule



However, you must be available to provide overlap and support during UK business hours when required



This ensures smooth communication with the Marketing Manager and wider team



EXPECTATION

PAY STRUCTURE



Monthly salary



Opportunity for long-term growth as the company scales



HOW TO APPLY

Any experience with Zoho or other CRM systems

title: Non-QM Underwriter
description:
We are seeking an experienced Non-QM Underwriter to join our growing team. 



This role is responsible for underwriting complex mortgage loan files that fall outside of traditional agency guidelines.

The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced environment, understands multiple investor guidelines, and can confidently assess borrower risk using non-traditional income documentation.



Key Responsibilities

Underwrite Non-QM mortgage loans including:

DSCR (Debt Service Coverage Ratio)

Bank Statement (personal & business)

Asset Depletion / Asset Qualifier

Interest-Only and Jumbo Non-QM loans



Analyze borrower credit, income, assets, and collateral to determine creditworthiness

Review and interpret investor guidelines, overlays, and credit matrices (e.g., eResi, Acra, etc.)

Issue loan decisions including approvals, conditions, suspensions, and denials

Re-underwrite and clear conditions in a timely manner

Ensure compliance with ATR (Ability-to-Repay), company policies, and regulatory requirements

Maintain detailed underwriting notes and documentation for audit and secondary market review

Collaborate with Loan Officers, Processors, and Operations to structure loans effectively



Qualifications

3–7+ years of mortgage underwriting experience

Minimum 2+ years of Non-QM underwriting experience strongly preferred

Deep understanding of Non-QM loan programs and alternative income analysis

Experience working with multiple Non-QM investors and guideline overlays

Ability to manually underwrite complex loan scenarios

Proficiency with Loan Origination Systems (e.g., Encompass)

Strong analytical, decision-making, and problem-solving skills



Performance Expectations

Maintain consistent underwriting turn times (24–72 hours)

Meet productivity goals (3–6 loans per day depending on complexity)

Maintain high-quality underwriting with low defect rates

Effectively manage conditions and loan pipelines

title: Rockstar Cold Caller (Lead Gen & Outreach)
description:
I am looking to hire 2–3 high-performing Cold Callers to join our team for lead generation and outbound outreach.



This is not a beginner role. We need professionals who are comfortable navigating gatekeepers, handling objections, and closing for the appointment. If you are confident on the phone and know how to turn a "maybe" into a booked opportunity, we want to talk to you.

Growth: Rate increases based on performance, consistency, and KPIs

Schedule: Must be available to work during US Business Hours (EST/PST)

Engagement: Build immediate rapport and clearly articulate our value proposition.

Lead Qualification: Filter prospects and set qualified appointments.

s to prospects after calls.

Scripts and training materials are provided, but you must be able to think on your feet during live conversations.



What I’m Looking For

Reliability: High-speed internet, a quiet workspace, and a proven history of punctuality.

How to Apply (Read Carefully)

title: UGC & Project Manager
description:
What this position is responsible for:



We’re looking for a highly organized and proactive UGC & Project Manager to oversee creator relationships and manage the operational flow of UGC campaigns. This role plays a critical part in ensuring that creator partnerships, campaign deliverables, and internal collaboration run smoothly from start to finish. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced digital marketing environment, is detail-oriented, and can confidently coordinate between creators, internal teams, and clients to ensure campaigns are executed at a high standard.



Requirements/Experience:

- 1–3+ years of experience in UGC management, influencer marketing, social media marketing, or digital marketing operations



- Experience sourcing, recruiting, and managing UGC creators or influencers across platforms such as TikTok and Instagram



- Strong project management and organizational skills, with the ability to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously



- Excellent communication and negotiation skills when working with creators and coordinating with internal teams



- Ability to manage timelines, deliverables, and campaign documentation with a high level of attention to detail



- Familiarity with social media trends, creator ecosystems, and UGC-style content



- Experience reviewing content and ensuring it follows brand guidelines, scripts, and campaign briefs



- Proficiency with project management tools, spreadsheets, and communication platforms (e.g., Google Sheets, Notion, Slack, Trello, etc.)



- Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to identify risks, delays, or bottlenecks early



- Self-starter mindset with the ability to work independently in a remote environment





Roles & Responsibilities for this position:



UGC Management



- Source and recruit high-quality UGC creators across platforms such as TikTok, Instagram, and other relevant social media channels to support ongoing campaigns.



- Build, maintain, and continuously grow a reliable roster of creators, ensuring access to talent that aligns with brand positioning and campaign goals.



- Conduct creator outreach and relationship management, including communication, negotiation of deliverables, and maintaining professional partnerships.



- Distribute campaign briefs, scripts, and brand guidelines to creators, ensuring all expectations and creative requirements are clearly communicated.



- Review and evaluate creator submissions to ensure content meets campaign standards before forwarding for internal or client approval.



- Track and document creator performance, reliability, and content quality to inform future collaborations.



- Maintain and organize creator databases, ensuring accurate records of contact details, past performance, and campaign participation.



Project Management



- Coordinate campaign timelines and deliverables between creators, internal team members, and clients to ensure smooth campaign execution.



- Monitor campaign schedules to ensure all deliverables are completed on time and meet required deadlines.



- Organize and maintain campaign assets and documentation, including briefs, scripts, and project files.



- Track overall project progress, proactively identifying potential delays, bottlenecks, or issues that may impact timelines.



- Communicate updates across teams to maintain alignment and ensure all stakeholders are informed throughout the campaign lifecycle.



- Support the overall campaign workflow by ensuring tasks, deadlines, and responsibilities are clearly defined and executed.



Apply today to join our team!

Candidates must be available to work Central Standard Time (CST) business hours.

Schedule: Full-time

Target Start Date: ASAP

title: Replo Landing Page Developer
description:
We're looking for a Replo Landing Page Developer who will play a critical role in turning high-level creative concepts into conversion-focused, revenue-driving eCommerce experiences. This role sits at the intersection of design, development, and performance, ensuring that every landing page is pixel-perfect, on-brand, and optimized to convert traffic into customers. You’ll be directly responsible for building, optimizing, and maintaining Shopify landing pages that support aggressive growth goals for modern eCommerce brands.

- Proven experience building Shopify landing pages using Replo

- Strong ability to translate Figma designs into pixel-accurate, responsive live pages

- Hands-on experience with Shopify-native functionality, including products, variants, carts, and checkout flows

- Solid understanding of conversion rate optimization (CRO) principles for eCommerce

- Experience building responsive layouts for desktop, tablet, and mobile

- Familiarity with brand guidelines, design systems, and UI standards

- Ability to use AI tools to increase efficiency, speed, and consistency in workflows

- High attention to detail with a strong eye for design accuracy and usability

- Ability to manage multiple builds simultaneously while meeting deadlines

- Clear communication skills and comfort collaborating with designers, marketers, and strategists



Roles & Responsibilities for this position:

- Build high-converting eCommerce landing pages in Replo, using Figma designs as the source of truth while ensuring clean, scalable builds that align with performance goals



- Translate Figma files into pixel-accurate, fully responsive Replo pages, ensuring consistency across desktop, tablet, and mobile experiences



- Implement Shopify-native functionality within Replo, including product selection, variants, add-to-cart behavior, and checkout flows that function seamlessly for the end user



- Ensure all pages strictly follow brand guidelines, design systems, and UI standards, maintaining visual consistency and professionalism across every build



- Optimize page layouts using CRO best practices, including above-the-fold clarity, strategic CTA placement, trust elements, and friction reduction



- Leverage AI tools to improve development efficiency, speed up repetitive tasks, and enhance overall output quality without sacrificing accuracy



- Collaborate with designers and performance marketers to ensure pages not only look great but are built to support testing, iteration, and measurable results

title: EXECUTIVE VIRTUAL ASSISTANT — RIGHT HAND TO THE CEO
description:
EXECUTIVE VIRTUAL ASSISTANT — RIGHT HAND TO THE CEO

The Price Group (TPG) | Remote / Philippines | Full-time | $800–$1,200/month USD



WHO WE ARE

The Price Group is a fast-growing, remote-first Insurance Marketing Organization founded by David Price in 2018. We've produced over $70M in total insurance premium and operate with a high-performance, no-excuses culture built around one philosophy: Never Settle. David is a Forbes Business Council contributor and is actively expanding TPG into coaching and media.



We move fast. We hold ourselves to a high standard. And we're looking for someone who does the same.



THE ROLE

This is not a typical VA role. You will be the operational right hand of the CEO — the person who makes sure David can stay focused on the highest-leverage activities in the business and nothing falls through the cracks.



You will own his inbox, his daily priorities, and his calendar. You will be the connective tissue between David and every other tea
mber. You will know what's happening across recruiting, agent operations, content, and business development — and you'll make sure the right things get done by the right people at the right time.



This role is for someone who is obsessed with organization, proactive by nature, and calm under pressure.



WHAT YOU'LL DO EVERY DAY

• Own David's inbox — Sort, prioritize, draft replies, and achieve inbox zero daily. David should rarely need to open his own
.

• Morning briefing doc — Every morning before 8am ET, prepare a written briefing: today's priorities,
s needing David's input, calendar overview, and any urgent flags.

• Calendar management — Schedule, confirm, and protect David's time. Manage conflicts. Ensure prep materials exist before important meetings.

• Task follow-up — Track commitments David makes across
, Slack, and meetings. Follow up on open items so nothing gets dropped.

• CRM & data entry — Log notes, update records, and keep information clean across our systems.

• Triage & route — Direct incoming requests to the right tea
mber and follow up that they're handled.

• Research & prep — Light research for meetings, content ideas, travel, and business decisions.

• Special projects — Content operations, vendor management, and team coordination as TPG grows.



TOOLS YOU MUST KNOW

Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Docs, Sheets) |
 | Calendly | Loom | Notion or Airtable | Zoom

Nice to have: GoHighLevel, or insurance/financial services CRM experience.



WHO YOU ARE

• 3+ years of experience supporting executives or business owners as a VA or EA

• Excellent written English — your replies will represent David

• Available during EST business hours (9am–6pm ET, Mon–Fri minimum)

• Proactive by nature — you fix problems without being asked twice

• You take ownership and notice when things aren't done

• Comfortable with fast pace and ambiguity

• Excellent references from past employers



THIS IS NOT A FIT IF...

• You need constant direction to know what to do next

• You treat this like a side job

• You've never supported a CEO or business owner

• You're not comfortable handling sensitive business information



COMPENSATION & SCHEDULE

Pay: $800–$1,200/month USD (depending on experience). Paid bi-weekly.

Hours: Full-time, 40 hours/week. Core hours overlap with EST.

Start: ASAP. Paid 1-week trial before full offer.

Growth: We promote from within and reward performance.



HOW TO APPLY — READ THIS CAREFULLY

Your application must include ALL THREE of the following or it will not be reviewed:



1.
 the following to 
 with the word "Never Settle" in the subject line

2. Your resume (PDF preferred)

3. A Loom video (2–3 minutes): Introduce yourself, walk us through your most relevant EA/VA experience, and tell us one specific example of a time you prevented something from falling through the cracks for an executive you supported. And walk us through systems or process you would use to organize this CEO's life. 

4. Answer this question in writing (minimum 150 words): "A CEO you support receives 200
s per day. Walk me through exactly how you would set up and manage his inbox from Day 1."



IMPORTANT: Start your application message with the phrase "Never Settle" to confirm you read this entire post. Applications without this phrase will be automatically disqualified.

title: Power Platform Analyst
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

As a Power Platform Analyst, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and debugging automated workflows and data visualizations. You will work closely with stakeholders to translate their needs into scalable solutions using the Microsoft Power Platform and enterprise integration tools like Boomi. If you are a proactive problem-solver with a passion for APIs and automation, we want to meet you!

 

Key Responsibilities:

Solution Design: Translate complex business requirements into technical specifications and end-to-end solutions.

Automation & Integration: Build and maintain sophisticated workflows using Power Automate and integrate various systems via Boomi and APIs.



Data Visualization: Design and deploy insightful Power BI dashboards that drive data-informed decision-making.

System Debugging: Proactively identify, troubleshoot, and resolve issues within existing flows, apps, and integrations.

Process Optimization: Analyze current business processes and recommend automated improvements to increase efficiency.

Documentation: Maintain thorough documentation of system architectures, API mappings, and workflow logic to ensure transparency.

- Microsoft Power Platform: Power Automate (Flow), Power BI, and Power Apps.

- Integration Tools: Boomi (AtomSphere) and Custom API Connectors.

Integration Expertise: Strong understanding of APIs and experience using middleware (like Boomi) to move data between systems.

- Analytical Mindset: Ability to "deconstruct" a business problem and rebuild it as a logical, automated process.

- Debugging Skills: A systematic approach to troubleshooting complex logic and connectivity issues.

mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:

We are seeking a strategic and business-minded Virtual CIO (vCIO) to serve as a high-level advisor for our diverse portfolio of business clients. In this role, you will act as an extension of our clients' executive teams, bridging the gap between their business goals and their technology infrastructure.

 

As a vCIO, you are not just a technical expert; you are a strategic partner. You will be responsible for developing long-term IT roadmaps, managing technology budgets, overseeing risk and compliance, and ensuring that every technical investment our clients make drives measurable business value. The ideal candidate has a deep understanding of Managed Services (MSP), excellent consultative skills, and the ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear business strategies.

 

Key Responsibilities

*Strategic IT Roadmapping & Planning

   - Conduct regular Strategic Business Reviews (SBRs) with clients to align technology with their 1–3 year business goals.

   - Develop and maintain comprehensive IT roadmaps, including hardware lifecycle management, cloud migrations, and 

     security enhancements.

   - Identify emerging technologies that can provide a competitive advantage or operational efficiency for specific client 

     verticals.

*Budgeting & Financial Management

   - Assist clients in developing and managing annual IT budgets.

   - Provide Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) analysis for new technology investments.

   - Help clients prioritize IT spending based on risk, ROI, and business impact.

*Risk, Security & Compliance

   - Oversee client security postures, ensuring alignment with frameworks like NIST, CIS, or industry-specific regulations 

     (HIPAA, PCI, SOC2).

   - Lead Disaster Recovery (DR) and Business Continuity (BC) planning and testing.

   - Act as a high-level advisor during security i
 or complex technical audits.

*Client Relationship & Account Leadership

   - Serve as the primary point of contact for executive-level stakeholders (CEOs, CFOs, Owners).

   - Monitor client satisfaction and service delivery trends, working with the technical team to ensure high standards are met.

   - Lead the technical onboarding of new high-value clients, setting the strategic foundation from day one.

*Vendor & Project Oversight

  - Assist clients in evaluating and managing third-party technology vendors (ISPs, Line-of-Business software, etc.).

  - Provide high-level oversight for major infrastructure projects to ensure they stay aligned with the strategic vision.

 

Qualifications

Required

- Experience: 7–10+ years of experience in IT leadership, senior systems engineering, or IT consulting (MSP experience is highly preferred).

- Strategic Mindset: Proven ability to develop long-term technology strategies that solve real-world business problems.

- Financial Literacy: Comfort managing budgets, performing ROI calculations, and discussing financial impact with executives.

- Communication Excellence: Exceptional ability to present to "C-Suite" executives and translate "geek-speak" into "business-speak."

- Broad Technical Knowledge: Deep understanding of Microsoft 365, Cloud Infrastructure (Azure/AWS), Networking, and Cybersecurity frameworks.

- Consultative Approach: Strong ability to influence stakeholders and lead through consensus and expertise.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

- Experience with ITIL frameworks or MSP-specific vCIO tools.

- Relevant certifications (e.g., CISSP, CISM, PMP, or advanced Microsoft/Cloud certifications).

- Previous experience in a "Fractional CIO" or "Account Lead" role within a technical service organization.

 

What Success Looks Like in This Role

- Clients view you as an indispensable member of their leadership team, not just a "vendor."

- Client IT environments are stable, secure, and proactively managed according to a documented roadmap.

- Technology spend is predictable for the client, with fewer "emergency" expenses.

- High client retention and growth through trusted, strategic recommendations.



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



*Submit your application and include the numbers (3812) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



*Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



*Currently looking for candidates in NCR or Luzon area of the Philippines



This is an overnight position. The working hours for this role are 8AM-5PM CST Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Remote Sales Setter (Aesthetic / Medical Industry)
description:
We are looking for a highly motivated and organised Sales Setter to join our growing team within the aesthetics and medical device industry.



You will be responsible for speaking with clinic owners, following up leads, and booking qualified discovery calls for our Sales Director.



This is not a cold, aggressive sales role.

We are building a structured, professional sales system and are looking for someone who can communicate clearly, follow processes, and manage conversations confidently.



We work with clinics across the UK, helping them introduce advanced aesthetic technologies and improve their treatment results, client retention, and revenue.



Our focus is long-term growth, not quick sales.



YOUR ROLE



You will be responsible for:



Contacting new leads (website, ads, social media)



Following up with existing and older leads



Starting and managing conversations with clinic owners



Qualifying leads based on simple criteria



Booking calls into our Sales Director’s calendar



Updating our CRM system (Zoho)



Sending follow-ups via WhatsApp,
, or phone





IMPORTANT



You are not expected to close deals.



Your role is to:



???? Start conversations

???? Build interest

???? Book qualified calls





WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



Strong written and spoken English



Confident and professional communication



Comfortable speaking on the phone



Organised and able to follow a structured process



Consistent and reliable



Able to work UK business hours (or overlap)



Experience in sales, appointment setting or lead generation is preferred



BONUS (NOT ESSENTIAL)



Experience in aesthetics, beauty, or medical industry



Experience using CRM systems (Zoho.)



Experience with Instagram / WhatsApp outreach





HOW YOU WILL WORK WITH THE TEAM



You will work alongside our lead generation team



You will pass booked calls to our Sales Director



You will support follow-ups and keep leads moving



This is a structured system, and full training, scripts, and support will be provided.





HOW TO APPLY



Please include:



A short introduction about your experience



Any sales or setting experience you have



A voice note (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself



Your availability (hours you can work)



FINAL NOTE



We are building a long-term team.



We are looking for someone reliable, consistent, and willing to grow with us.

title: High converting social media ads
description:
OVERVIEW:



At Blue Zone Pets, we believe the single biggest lever you have over your dog's health is what you put in their bowl. We're a pet nutrition brand built around one mission: their longest life, back in your hands. Our food is 80% real meat, dried below 40°C to lock in maximum nutrients, with zero fillers, zero additives — just ingredients you can actually read and trust. We're building a brand that dog owners genuinely believe in, backed by a 4.6 Trustpilot rating and a growing community of owners who've seen the difference real nutrition makes. We're still early, moving fast, and looking for people who want to build something that matters. Join us as a Graphic Designer and help us become the standard for how dogs should be fed.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Design high-performing creatives, static ads, and branded assets that are on-brand and built to convert — owning the visual output from concept to final file.

2. Use AI generation tools to produce raw assets, then refine them with enhancement tools (Magnific AI, Topaz, Photoshop AI) until quality is indistinguishable from a professional shoot.

3. Proactively pitch new content ideas, visual formats, and workflow improvements — you don't wait for briefs, you spot opportunities and ship.



REQUIREMENTS:

1. A sharp-eyed designer with deep command of layout, typography, colour, and composition — highly proficient in Figma (primary) and Adobe Creative Suite.

2. Skilled at AI-assisted design: you use generative tools to create base assets and enhancement tools to push them to production quality. One render is never your final output.

3. Self-managing, organised, and deadline-driven — you don't need hand-holding. You see what needs doing and do it.

4. A quick learner who adapts fast to new tools and workflows; experience with Notion for project management, WhatsApp for daily communication, and openness to tools like Gather for virtual collaboration as we scale.

5. Genuinely excited about what we're building at Blue Zone — you care about quality, you care about pets, and you want to be part of a brand that's changing how people think about dog nutrition.



WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT FROM US:

- A small, ambitious team where your work has direct impact — no layers, no bureaucracy, just ownership and 
ntum.

- A culture that rewards initiative. If you spot an opportunity and act on it, we'll notice.

- Real growth potential — we're scaling quickly, and the people who join now will shape how this company operates as it grows.

- Founders who are hands-on, transparent, and genuinely invested in your development — not just your output.



COMPENSATION:

- Part-time position. Monthly creative sprints

- Competitive rate based on experience and qualifications. Per project basis, $10 per project ? $300 p/m



APPLICATION PROCESS:

Here's how to apply:



Fill out this form ? Apply here: 
/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfpKsPzRTlRlBchmQGnBe44Ny5yJKk-vDUbNtUykxA_Ezm2aQ/viewform?usp=header



Only completed applications will be considered.



Once you've submitted, reply here with the subject line: "PAW"



We're looking forward to hearing from you. If you're the right fit, you'll be joining a team that's building something dogs (and their owners) actually deserve.



Best regards,

Dean

Co-founder of Blue Zone Pets

title: Senior Operations Manager — Lead Generation
description:
*PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION AND ANSWER THE QUESTIONS BEFORE APPLYING*



Senior Operations Manager 

Company:  Lucky Growth Partners Ltd

Employment type:  Full-time · Long-term

Location:  Remote 

Start date:  ASAP

Salary:  Up to $2000 per month for the right candidate



About the role

LGP is a fast-growing company currently operating in the UK, with expansion plans for Australia and USA in the coming months. We’re building a high-performing overseas team and we need a senior operations professional to be the bridge between our founders and that team — from day one.

This is not an entry-level role. You will own the entire operations function: recruiting, onboarding, training, HR, process documentation, and billing. You will be involved in every hire we make, and as the team grows, so does your role. The long-term path for the right person is Head of Operations. Experience is essential, please do not apply if you do not have experience in the roles listed above.



What you’ll be responsible for"

-Talent acquisition — Recruit all overseas hires end-to-end. You know the Filipino talent market and you know who to look for.

-Onboarding & training — Own the onboarding experience for every new hire. Build and maintain training materials that scale with the team.

-SOPs & process documentation — Work with our automations specialist to build and maintain SOPs. Document everything so the business runs without heroics.

-Performance management & HR — Keep the team performing at a high level. Handle HR matters with professionalism and cultural sensitivity.

-Billing & financial admin — Manage billing through the LGP dashboard.

-Cultural liaison — Be the bridge. Help the overseas team understand how the founders work, and help founders understand their team.



Who you are

-Senior-level ops professional with 4+ years of experience managing remote or distributed teams(evidence required)

-Experienced in end-to-end recruitment, particularly sourcing talent through OnlineJobs.ph and similar platforms

-Comfortable working directly with founders — you give updates without being chased and flag problems before they escalate

-Strong written English and confident communicator

-Process-oriented — you document what you build, and you build things that last

-Wants to grow — this role is the foundation of a Head of Operations position as the company scales



What we offer

Full-time, long-term engagement — we hire for careers, not contracts

Competitive monthly salary paid reliably and on time

100% remote — work from wherever you are in the Philippines

Direct access to founders — no layers of management, no bureaucracy

Clear growth path — perform well and the Head of Operations role is yours



How to apply

Send your application through OnlineJobs.ph. In your message, please include:

A brief overview of your ops experience and the size of teams you’ve managed

A real SOP or process document you’ve written, Any format is fine (PDF, Google Doc, Notion). We’re looking for structure, clarity, and evidence of original thinking.

A short Loom video walkthrough of how you would approach onboarding a new hire in your first week. 

LinkedIn profiles of two or three people you have hired



-----------------------------

Questions to answer:



“Describe a time when a hire didn’t work out. What was your role in that, and what did you change as a result?”

“What’s the most common mistake from your experience that western founders make when managing remote workers?”

“Name the specific tools you’ve used to build automations or SOPs.”





Applications without a personal message will not be considered.

?

?

 • Is reliable and owns their work

?



???? Example Edits We Like

?

Monday–Friday

Flexible hours but must hit deadlines and communicate daily via Slack + Drive.



?

Top performers can earn more over time.



?

Subject line:

I Want To Be Your Long-Form Video Editor – [Your Name]



?

You move to the top if you:

?



If you want to be part of a fast-growing brand with massive scale and long-term work, we’d love to see what you can do.

 for feedback and collaboration.

title: Video Editor Wanted – YouTube (Multiple Channels) | Long-Term
description:
We run multiple YouTube channels. Scripts and voiceovers are provided; your job is to edit.

Quality Standards (Shorts + Long Form)

1. Pacing

Remove all dead air and filler

Keep clips tight, no long static visuals

Everything should feel smooth and intentional

2. Movement

Add light zoom or motion to static images

Subtle transitions only, nothing distracting

Keep visuals dynamic at all times

3. Sound Design (very important)

Add sound effects when images appear/disappear

Add impact sounds for dramatic 
nts

No silent visual swaps, sound enhances energy, never overpowers

4. Visual Sync

Person mentioned ? show that exact person

Event mentioned ? show that event

No random filler visuals

5. Retention

Pattern interrupts every 5–8 seconds (cut, zoom, text, sound)

Shorts: hook must land in the first 2 seconds

The goal: every video feels Dynamic. Premium. High-retention. Not basic.

Sample of the quality we expect:

???? 

Watch it before applying. Your sample should match this level.

You need:

1+ year YouTube editing experience

Proficient in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut Pro

Captions, text overlays, B-roll, transitions

Thumbnail creation (Canva or Photoshop)

Reliable and meets deadlines

To apply, you must:

Submit a sample edited video (YouTube link or Drive)

Agree to a paid trial edit before being hired

Applications without a sample will not be reviewed.

Pay is negotiable. Long-term opportunity for the right person.

title: Full-Time WordPress Developer Virtual Assistant
description:
We are a U.S.-based web services business looking for a skilled full-time WordPress developer to join our team.



This role is for someone who can work confidently inside existing WordPress websites and handle the kind of day-to-day work that keeps sites running well. That includes updates, troubleshooting, plugin work, layout changes, content implementation, maintenance, and general website support across multiple client websites.



This is not just a page-building role. We need someone who is technically capable, dependable, detail-oriented, and careful when working on live sites. You should be comfortable fixing issues, improving functionality, making updates safely, and following instructions closely.



What we need:

Strong WordPress experience

HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP

Experience building responsive, mobile-friendly websites

Ability to troubleshoot plugin conflicts, broken layouts, and general site issues

WordPress maintenance, troubleshooting, and debugging

Ability to convert PSD designs into custom WordPress themes

Experience with SSL implementation and website security

Experience working with WordPress themes, plugins, page builders, and the WordPress admin dashboard

Experience working with WordPress plugins including Custom Post Types and ACF (Advanced Custom Fields)

Familiarity with Linux-based hosting environments such as HostGator, Namecheap, GoDaddy, and similar platforms

Familiarity with Google tools such as Google Analytics and Google Search Console

Basic knowledge of SEO and website performance optimization



Typical work may include

Updating WordPress websites

Building or modifying pages based on direction provided

Installing, configuring, and adjusting plugins

Troubleshooting WordPress issues

Improving site layout, responsiveness, and usability

Cleaning up older sites

Implementing content and design changes



Tools and workflow

You should be comfortable working with tools such as:

Adobe Photoshop or similar design tools

VS Code or similar code editors

FTP tools

Modern web browsers for testing and debugging



Important

We value people who can follow instructions, communicate clearly in English, and pay attention to detail. Reliability matters. Carelessness does not age well around live websites.



Compensation

Starting at 33,000 PHP, negotiable based on experience, speed, communication ability, and quality of work.



Hours

Preferably full-time.



HOW TO APPLY FOR THIS POSITION

Provide a link to your resume and answer the following questions.



Please note that the point of asking you to answer the following questions is to enable us to gauge your ability to follow instructions, your command of the English language, your ability to communicate clearly, and your attention to detail. Applicants that do not fully answer the questions below will be ignored.



Please answer each question using the same numbering format below.

Questions:

1. Please describe your experience working with WordPress.

2. Have you built and launched a website from scratch to a live production site? Please describe your role in the process.

3. Please list at least three WordPress websites you have worked on and describe your role in building each site.

4. Please describe your experience with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP, and tell us which of those you are strongest in.

5. Please describe your experience working with WordPress themes, plugins, page builders, and plugin troubleshooting.

6. If you have worked with Woo Commerce or other ecommerce platforms, please describe what you did.

7. Please tell us about a difficult WordPress problem you solved and how you solved it.

8. Tell us something about yourself that is not written on your resume but will help us get to know you better as a person.

9. How many hours a week would you prefer to work? If less than full-time, please specify.

10. If hired, will this be your second job or your only job?

11. Please tell us what you would like to get better at, or gain more experience in, associated with web development generally.

12. Please include a link to a screenshot of your internet speed, confirm your computer setup, and whether you are comfortable working on live websites carefully and methodically.



To learn more about us, visit: Holistic Web Presence

title: Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Operations Virtual Assistant

(Process-Driven | High-Precision | Behind-the-Scenes Operations)



Job Overview



Maid In America Cleaning Services is hiring an Operations Virtual Assistant to protect schedule integrity, data accuracy, and operational consistency.



This is a behind-the-scenes execution role. You will not be customer-facing. You will work inside defined systems and SOPs to ensure our operational engine runs cleanly and efficiently every day.



If you enjoy structured work, moving quickly without sacrificing accuracy, and taking pride in clean execution, this role will feel natural to you.



What You’ll Do:



1. Scheduling & Job Management (Primary Responsibility)

You will own scheduling preparation and system accuracy for our TN locations.



This includes:

- Creating and modifying clients, jobs, and visits in Jobber

- Preparing future-day schedules for review and approval

- Creating training tasks in Jobber for new tea
mbers

- Re-sequencing jobs and rebalancing teams within defined guardrails

- Maintaining week-to-week schedule consistency whenever possible

- Flagging and correcting conflicts or inefficiencies early

- Executing same-day scheduling adjustments exactly as directed



2. Data Accuracy & System Integrity

You will ensure operational data is accurate, complete, and reliable.



This includes:

- Updating customer notes, job frequencies, and service details

- Invoicing customers promptly after service completion

- Calculating cost-of-service data after jobs

- Preparing timesheet and tips reports for payroll

- Logging complaints and rectified cleans accurately

- Creating and publishing weekly operational reports

- Manual KPI data entry

- Verifying work-to-labor ratios using company tools



3. Administrative Support

You will support operational structure and remove administrative friction.



This includes:

- Supporting the Assistant Operations Manager with administrative execution

- Maintaining internal trackers and shared documents

- Following established documentation and checklists consistently



What This Role Requires

- High pace with high accuracy

- Comfort with structured, repeatable tasks

- Strong attention to detail

- Clear communication when issues arise

- Strong adherence defined systems and guardrails

- Ability to work independently within clear expectations



This role involves a high volume of operational tasks that must be completed correctly and consistently. As the company grows, volume will increase — and this role grows with it.



Who We’re Looking For



Detail-Oriented & Reliable

You take pride in doing things correctly and thoroughly.



High Throughput Executor

You can handle volume without losing structure or focus.



Process-Driven

You work well inside defined systems and appreciate clear expectations.



Accountable Communicator

You flag issues early, own mistakes quickly, and ask for clarification when needed.



Tech-Comfortable

You’re comfortable using tools like Slack, Google Suite, Chrome extensions, and scheduling platforms. Experience with Jobber is a strong plus.



Experienced in Fast-Paced Admin or Scheduling

Background in administrative, dispatch, logistics, scheduling, or operations-heavy roles is

preferred.



Work Requirements

- Monday–Friday, 8AM–5PM U.S. Central Time

- Reliable internet with backup

- Dedicated workspace

- Backup power options in case of outages

- Fluent written English



Our Core Values

- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If these values resonate with you, we want to hear from you.



Important Screening Step (Read Carefully)



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

1. Complete our Culture Index survey: 

2. Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value you most resonate with (ALL CAPS).

3. Use a minimum of 5 Apply Points when applying

4. In your application message, include one sentence describing the most repetitive task you have performed at a high standard for 6+ months.



Applications that do not follow all instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Virtual Assistant - Business Acquisitions & Operations (Notion)
description:
We are a consulting company that buys, operates, and grows small businesses — specifically companies that hold government contracts with federal agencies including the Army, GSA, and other military branches.



We are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to manage our internal operating system built entirely in Notion. This is not a general admin role. This is a systems-focused operations position where you will be the person who keeps our deal pipeline, portfolio companies, government contract bids, broker relationships, and partner assignments running accurately every single day.



You will work directly with the CEO and will be given a full training manual and step-by-step workflow guide on day one. Your job is to follow the system, keep it current, and flag anything important to the CEO immediately.



If you love organized systems, take pride in keeping records accurate, and want to work inside a fast-moving acquisition business — this role is for you.



What You Will Do Every Day:



- Open the CEO Dashboard every morning and review active deals, upcoming bids, and follow-up dates

- Update deal stages in the Acquisition Pipeline the same day anything changes

- Log all calls,
s, and meetings in the Notes Log using our standard format

- Track government contract bid dates and flag any bids due within the week to the CEO

- Update bid statuses in the Bids Master Database (Upcoming ? Submitted ? Awarded / Lost)

- Log new acquisition targets in the GovCon Targets database and calculate their Acquisition Fit Score

- Add new broker contacts to the Broker Network and update Last Contact after every interaction

- Flag any broker not contacted in 30+ days for CEO follow-up

- Update portfolio company revenue by the 5th of every month

- Add new companies to Portfolio Companies when deals close and link all related bids

title: Figma static social media ad designer
description:
OVERVIEW:



At Blue Zone Pets, we believe the single biggest lever you have over your dog's health is what you put in their bowl. We're a pet nutrition brand built around one mission: their longest life, back in your hands. Our food is 80% real meat, dried below 40°C to lock in maximum nutrients, with zero fillers, zero additives — just ingredients you can actually read and trust. We're building a brand that dog owners genuinely believe in, backed by a 4.6 Trustpilot rating and a growing community of owners who've seen the difference real nutrition makes. We're still early, moving fast, and looking for people who want to build something that matters. Join us as a Graphic Designer and help us become the standard for how dogs should be fed.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Design high-performing creatives, static ads, and branded assets that are on-brand and built to convert — owning the visual output from concept to final file.

2. Use AI generation tools to produce raw assets, then refine them with enhancement tools (Magnific AI, Topaz, Photoshop AI) until quality is indistinguishable from a professional shoot.

3. Proactively pitch new content ideas, visual formats, and workflow improvements — you don't wait for briefs, you spot opportunities and ship.



REQUIREMENTS:

1. A sharp-eyed designer with deep command of layout, typography, colour, and composition — highly proficient in Figma (primary) and Adobe Creative Suite.

2. Skilled at AI-assisted design: you use generative tools to create base assets and enhancement tools to push them to production quality. One render is never your final output.

3. Self-managing, organised, and deadline-driven — you don't need hand-holding. You see what needs doing and do it.

4. A quick learner who adapts fast to new tools and workflows; experience with Notion for project management, WhatsApp for daily communication, and openness to tools like Gather for virtual collaboration as we scale.

5. Genuinely excited about what we're building at Blue Zone — you care about quality, you care about pets, and you want to be part of a brand that's changing how people think about dog nutrition.



WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT FROM US:

- A small, ambitious team where your work has direct impact — no layers, no bureaucracy, just ownership and 
ntum.

- A culture that rewards initiative. If you spot an opportunity and act on it, we'll notice.

- Real growth potential — we're scaling quickly, and the people who join now will shape how this company operates as it grows.

- Founders who are hands-on, transparent, and genuinely invested in your development — not just your output.



COMPENSATION:

- Part-time position. Monthly creative sprints

- Competitive rate based on experience and qualifications. Per project basis, $15 per project ? $450 p/m



APPLICATION PROCESS:

Here's how to apply:



Fill out this form ? Apply here: 



Only completed applications will be considered.



Once you've submitted, reply here with the subject line: "LONGEST LIFE"



We're looking forward to hearing from you. If you're the right fit, you'll be joining a team that's building something dogs (and their owners) actually deserve.



Best regards,

Dean

Co-founder of Blue Zone Pets

title: Motion Graphics Artist (with Video Editing Experience)
description:
PLEASE READ THE WHOLE JOB APPLICATION BEFORE APPLYING! Only apply through the link at the bottom. Submissions through the OLJ platform will not be read.



About Us:

We are a fast-growing startup comprised of four companies: A digital marketing agency specialized in retail liquor (alcohol), a SaaS company focused for alcoholic-beverage niche (liquorchat.ai), a high-ticket full-services content agency for any niche, and an AI SEO agency for law firms. Our team works globally and collaborates across all four businesses, offering significant opportunities for learning and growth. This role focuses on developing and editing internal YouTube Shorts and long-form YouTube videos, plus creating engaging motion graphics. You will work closely with our founder to create content that attracts inbound leads.



Position Details

Starting as a part-time role, potentially moving to full-time as we expand. You’ll play an important part in growing our video and motion graphics function. Working hours are flexible within Eastern Time (US), based on your preference.



MUST provide a portfolio with both short and long form video content, plus motion graphics samples.



Foundational to intermediate motion graphics skills are preferred.



Key Responsibilities



- Design and animate on-screen graphics: titles, animated text, captions, logo hits, simple charts, and transitions.

- Build a consistent graphics kit: intros, outros, lower thirds, end screens, and reusable templates in After Effects.

Create clear on-screen cues that highlight the hook, steps, and takeaways.

- Set simple style guides for type, icons, color, and export sizes for each platform.

- Cut video with the graphics in mind so timing lands. Add basic sound hits and light compositing when needed.

- Deliver versions for YouTube, Shorts, Reels, and TikTok.

- Check readability, safe areas, brand consistency, and clean exports.

- Work with the production manager and copywriter to script on-screen text and plan where graphics appear.

- Keep projects organized from brief to final file with clean layers and folders.

- Share drafts, take notes, and turn revisions quickly.

- Help find, onboard, and support other motion artists and editors.



Qualifications

- 2+ years editing short- and long-form video in a professional setting

- Portfolio that clearly shows both strong edits and motion graphics work

- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro or Final Cut Pro; strong After Effects skills for titles, lower thirds, logo animations, and animated text, Cap Cut, Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop, Canva

- Solid grasp of animation fundamentals: timing, easing, keyframing, masking, and basic tracking

- Ability to build reusable graphics packages and templates

- Basic color correction and audio cleanup within the edit

- Asset prep in Photoshop and Illustrator

- Nice to have: CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or basic 3D/text animation tools

- Strong sense of story and pacing, with clean, organized project files

- Self-directed, dependable, and deadline-oriented

- Up to date on YouTube, Shorts, Reels, and TikTok formats, aspect ratios, and delivery specs



You NEED to mention the name Alden at the end of the application for this to be read.



What We Offer

- Room to grow with a busy, expanding agency.

- Collaborative and supportive team.

- Potential to move into a full-time role.

- Projects that have a direct impact on company growth.



Application Link: 
/to/wsVaB3qi
