title: NetSuite Accountant
description:
Please apply ONLY if you have hands-on NETSUITE experience. This is a full-time role aligned with US working hours (flexible schedule).



Role Overview

The Accountant reports directly to the Financial Controller and is responsible for managing core accounting functions, including Accounts Receivable (AR), General Ledger (GL), and Accounts Payable (AP) along with cash management. This role ensures that financial records are accurate, processes run efficiently, and reporting timelines are consistently met. The position is heavily involved in the month-end close and overall financial reporting activities.



Acting as the Controller’s right hand and backup, this role helps maintain continuity across accounting operations.



Key Responsibilities



Accounts Receivable & Billing

• Lead end-to-end AR operations across a large and growing client base (900+ accounts)

• Own and manage the bi-weekly invoicing cycle within NetSuite

• Support and collaborate with the billing team on day-to-day activities

• Handle AR reconciliations, adjustments, credit memos, and issue resolution

• Assist with collections by preparing accurate reports and providing actionable insights

• Work with large datasets in Excel to validate billing data and reconcile balances

• Support initiatives to automate and improve billing workflows



General Ledger & Month-End Close

• Partner with the Financial Controller to execute and manage month-end close

• Prepare journal entries, accrals, reconciliations, and necessary adjustments

• Generate and review financial statements for accuracy and completeness

• Identify opportunities to accelerate the close process

• Ensure the integrity and accuracy of the general ledger



Accounts Payable & Cash Management

• Oversee AP processes, including vendor payments and workflow management

• Ensure proper expense classification and coding within the GL

• Monitor payment schedules, approvals, and disbursements; process or release payments via banking platforms

• Support payroll-related disbursements for virtual assistants

• Track cash positions and assist in maintaining rolling cash flow forecasts



Systems, Data & Process Improvements

• Utilize NetSuite and Excel extensively for daily operations

• Analyze and reconcile large volumes of financial data

• Identify inefficiencies and recommend process improvements

• Develop and maintain SOPs and internal controls



Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in Accounting

• CPA is a plus

• 3–5 years of progressive accounting experience

• Strong experience with general ledger functions in a US accounting environment

• Background in high-volume accounts receivable operations

• Advanced Excel skills with experience handling large datasets



Skills & Competencies

• Hands-on NetSuite experience, especially in AR and data imports

• Advanced Excel proficiency (e.g., pivot tables, complex formulas)

• Highly reliable with strong sense of accountability

• Detail-oriented with a data-driven mindset

• Able to work independently with minimal supervision

• Experience collaborating with remote teams

• Strong written and verbal communication skills



What We Offer

• Equipment provided

• 13th month pay

• HMO coverage

• Paid holidays

• Paid time off (PTO)

• Remote setup



How to Apply

Please write a short cover letter and share a Google Drive link to your resume. Ensure the link is accessible to anyone with the link.

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Strategic Launch Mentor (VA Agency Specialist)
description:
Seeking a Mentor/Consultant who has actually launched a VA Agency before. Or has actually launched their own business, in general.



I am a 15-year sales and operations veteran (Revenue Architect) with experience scaling startups for others. I’m now keen on launching my own VA agency, and I want to get the foundation right from Day 1.



This isn't a staff role. I don't need help "building pipes" or doing tasks. I need a Strategic Sounding Board for a few hours a month to answer the below:



Solo vs. Co-Founder: 

How to decide if I launch alone or bring on a partner now vs. later.



Zero-Capital Launch: 

Strategies for launching with near-zero capital using a "Revenue-First" approach.



Sequencing: 

The order of operations—what is actually "must-have" vs. "nice-to-have" for a launch.



The Requirements (Strict):



Experience: 

You must have personally launched a VA agency or helped multiple business owners do so from scratch.



Mission Alignment: 

This will be a Christ-centered business. You must understand how to integrate Kingdom principles (like our mandatory Paid Bible Study) into a high-velocity business model.



Integrity: 

I value stewardship over raw growth.

title: Credentialing and Contracting Specialist
description:
Job Title: Credentialing and Contracting Specialist

Location: Remote (from your home)– US Shift

Employment Type: Full-Time

Industry: US Healthcare



About the Company

We are a US-based healthcare services organization with decades of experience supporting healthcare providers and organizations across the United States. Our team specializes in healthcare operations, credentialing, and administrative support that helps healthcare professionals and institutions maintain compliance and operate efficiently.

With a strong focus on quality, compliance, and operational excellence, we work closely with healthcare organizations to streamline provider onboarding, credentialing, and workforce support processes.



Role Overview

We are seeking a Credentialing and Contracting Specialist to support healthcare provider credentialing and contracting processes. The ideal candidate will be responsible for verifying provider qualifications, managing credentialing documentation, and assisting with provider contracting activities to ensure compliance with healthcare regulations and organizational requirements.



Key Responsibilities

Manage the end-to-end credentialing process for healthcare providers including verification of licenses, certifications, education, and work history

Ensure all providers meet credentialing and compliance requirements before onboarding

Maintain accurate provider credentialing records and documentation

Coordinate with healthcare providers to collect required credentialing and contracting documents

Track license expirations, renewals, and compliance deadlines

Assist with preparation and coordination of provider contracts and agreements

Maintain credentialing data and documentation within internal systems and databases

Communicate with internal teams and healthcare partners regarding credentialing status and updates



Required Qualifications

1–3 years of experience in healthcare credentialing, provider enrollment, or healthcare administration

Knowledge of US healthcare credentialing processes

Strong attention to detail and documentation management skills

Good communication and organizational skills



Preferred Skills

Experience with CAQH, NPI, Medicare/Medicaid provider enrollment

Familiarity with US healthcare staffing or provider onboarding processes

Experience working in US shift environments



Work Schedule

Willingness to work US business hours



How to Apply

Interested candidates are invited to apply by
ing their updated resume to 
 with the subject line “Credentialing and Contracting Specialist.”

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next steps in the hiring process.

description:

The Role:

Edit 7-12 Reels per week in Heygen Video Agent/Capcut (Captions, B-roll, Client Style).

Speed: 24-48 hour turnaround time (Mon-Fri).

CapCut

We also use notion for our client's research and scripts for status and reference.

title: Graphic Designer | Social Media Graphics | Figma
description:
OVERVIEW:



At Blue Zone Pets, we believe the single biggest lever you have over your dog's health is what you put in their bowl. We're a pet nutrition brand built around one mission: their longest life, back in your hands. Our food is 80% real meat, dried below 40°C to lock in maximum nutrients, with zero fillers, zero additives — just ingredients you can actually read and trust. We're building a brand that dog owners genuinely believe in, backed by a 4.6 Trustpilot rating and a growing community of owners who've seen the difference real nutrition makes. We're still early, moving fast, and looking for people who want to build something that matters. Join us as a Graphic Designer and help us become the standard for how dogs should be fed.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Design high-performing creatives, static ads, and branded assets that are on-brand and built to convert — owning the visual output from concept to final file.

2. Use AI generation tools to produce raw assets, then refine them with enhancement tools (Magnific AI, Topaz, Photoshop AI) until quality is indistinguishable from a professional shoot.

3. Proactively pitch new content ideas, visual formats, and workflow improvements — you don't wait for briefs, you spot opportunities and ship.



REQUIREMENTS:

1. A sharp-eyed designer with deep command of layout, typography, colour, and composition — highly proficient in Figma (primary) and Adobe Creative Suite.

2. Skilled at AI-assisted design: you use generative tools to create base assets and enhancement tools to push them to production quality. One render is never your final output.

3. Self-managing, organised, and deadline-driven — you don't need hand-holding. You see what needs doing and do it.

4. A quick learner who adapts fast to new tools and workflows; experience with Notion for project management, WhatsApp for daily communication, and openness to tools like Gather for virtual collaboration as we scale.

5. Genuinely excited about what we're building at Blue Zone — you care about quality, you care about pets, and you want to be part of a brand that's changing how people think about dog nutrition.



WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT FROM US:

- A small, ambitious team where your work has direct impact — no layers, no bureaucracy, just ownership and 
ntum.

- A culture that rewards initiative. If you spot an opportunity and act on it, we'll notice.

- Real growth potential — we're scaling quickly, and the people who join now will shape how this company operates as it grows.

- Founders who are hands-on, transparent, and genuinely invested in your development — not just your output.



COMPENSATION:

- Part-time position. Monthly creative sprints

- Competitive rate based on experience and qualifications. Per project basis, $20 per project ? $600 p/m



APPLICATION PROCESS:

Here's how to apply:



Fill out this form ? Apply here: 
/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfpKsPzRTlRlBchmQGnBe44Ny5yJKk-vDUbNtUykxA_Ezm2aQ/viewform?usp=header



Only completed applications will be considered.



Once you've submitted, reply here with the subject line: "TAILS"



We're looking forward to hearing from you. If you're the right fit, you'll be joining a team that's building something dogs (and their owners) actually deserve.



Best regards,

Dean

Co-founder of Blue Zone Pets

title: Customer Support Agent
description:
OVERVIEW:



At Suppdog, we're not just another e-commerce brand; we're a passionate team dedicated to improving the lives of dogs through proactive supplementation. Founded 2 years ago, our mission is to tackle common health issues in dogs, such as itching, gut health, poor mobility, and dental problems, with our innovative supplement solutions. Every day, we aim to make dogs healthier and happier, striving for a future where veterinarians recommend our products as a first-line solution, and our community of over a million wagging tails advocates for our cause. We're on a path to donate €100,000 to Stichting Dierenlot, and help over 1.000.000 dogs in need for better health. We need your help to get there! Join us as a customer support rep and play a pivotal role in our journey towards creating a significant impact in the canine world.KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



1. Provide support and solutions to customers via
, and live chat.

2. Process and follow up on customer inquiries and complaints.

3. Collaborate with various departments to efficiently resolve customer inquiries.

4. Contribute to improving customer satisfaction and service processes.

5. Administrative tasks related to customer service.



REQUIREMENTS:



1. You have excellent communicative skills in English.

2. You have experience in the use of AI (we are active in Europe), so all the answers will need to be translated to the native country with AI

3. Experience in a customer service environment is a must.

4. You are customer-oriented, patient, and solution-oriented.

5. You can multitask and work in a dynamic environment.

6. Basic knowledge of Re:amaze & WooCommerce is a plus.

7. A quick learner who can adapt to new tools and software; experience with Notion for project management, WhatsApp for communication, and a willingness to use Gather for a virtual office environment in the future.

8. Passionate about the mission and vision of Suppdog, with a desire to contribute to our goal of creating healthier lives for dogs.



WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT FROM US:



- A dynamic, young team that's rapidly growing and fully committed to making a difference in the lives of dogs and their owners.

- A supportive environment that values innovation, learning, and collaboration.

- The opportunity to grow with the company, potentially leading to increased responsibilities, skill enhancement, and personal development.

- A chance to be part of a company that values long-term relationships with its tea
mbers, aiming for mutual growth and success.



HOURS & COMPENSATION:



- Part-time position (14 hours/week).

- Competitive rate based on experience and qualifications. ($3 per hour)



APPLICATION PROCESS:



Here's how to apply:



Fill out this form ? 



Only those who complete the application form will be given consideration for the position.



Once you’ve completed submitting this form, send us a reply here with the subject:

”PAW”



We look forward to hearing from you and potentially welcoming you to our team. Together, we can make a significant impact on the health and happiness of dogs around the world.



Best Regards,



Dean

Suppdog

title: Bookkeeper Accountant
description:
We are looking for a proficient bookkeeper/accountant to join our team. The successful candidate will be responsible for keeping our QuickBooks Online software updated to ensure management receives accurate and timely monthly profit & loss statements and balance sheet.The company recently moved from Sage to QuickBooks Online, so we need someone with expertise to get us caught up with the transfer (we are several months behind) and then keep us current on a monthly basis. This position requires more hours in the beginning but fewer once in monthly maintenance mode and automations have been perfected in QuickBooks. If the candidate would like more hours once the backlogged process is complete, we have other duties that can be assigned, such as payroll and benefits administration.



Company Summary:



Allegiant Wealth Group is an insurance marketing organization specializing in recruiting, training, and managing sales agents for life and health insurance companies. While we have an office in Alpharetta, GA, all employees work remotely, providing a flexible and collaborative work environment.



Responsibilities:



Maintain and update QuickBooks Online with accurate financial data.

Prepare and present monthly Profit & Loss statements and balance sheets to management.

Ensure financial records are accurate and up-to-date.

Collaborate with other tea
mbers to improve financial reporting and processes.



Requirements:



Experience in bookkeeping with a solid understanding of accounting principles.

Experience in preparing a chart of accounts and balance sheet.

Experience in preparing and reading a profit and loss statement.

Proficiency in QuickBooks Online software.

Detail-oriented with strong organizational skills.

Ability to work independently in a remote setting.



Preferred Qualifications:



An accounting degree or related field experience is preferred, but not necessary.

The candidate MUST be an expert in QuickBooks and must have experience setting up a QuickBooks chart of accounts and posting to the general ledger.



THE MONTHLY SALARY POSTED HERE IS BASED ON AN AVERAGE OF 20 HRS A WEEK, WITH PAY RANGING FROM $5 TO $7/HR USD. IN THE BEGINNING, DUE TO THE TRANSITION, WE MAY EXCEED 20 HRS A WEEK, AND THE PAY WILL BE BASED ON THE $5-$7/HR RANGE BASED ON EXPERIENCE.

title: Email Marketing Strategist (Klaviyo Expert) — E-commerce Skincare Brand.
description:
We are a premium European skincare brand (adelira®) selling in the Netherlands and Belgium. We help women 50+ see real, visible results in their skin. Our product actually works — the challenge is turning subscribers into buyers, and buyers into loyal repeat customers through strategic
 marketing.



We're looking for an
 Marketing Strategist who owns the entire
 channel in Klaviyo — strategy, design, and execution. All in one pair of hands.



THE ROLE



You'll build and improve automated flows, plan weekly campaigns, design the
s yourself in Klaviyo, run structured A/B tests, and turn our
 list into a predictable revenue engine.



This is a full-ownership role. You think strategically about what to send, to whom, when, and why — then you design and build it yourself. No handoffs, no waiting for a designer. You control the entire process from concept to send.



We provide brand guidelines, product photography, and creative assets. You turn them into
s that drive revenue.





WHAT YOU'LL DO



Automated Flows (Klaviyo):

- Build and optimize the full flow ecosystem: welcome series, abandoned cart, browse abandonment, post-purchase nurture, replenishment reminders, win-back, sunset, VIP, and birthday flows

- Set up conditional splits and branching logic based on customer behavior, purchase history, and engagement

- Configure dynamic content blocks and personalized product recommendations

- Monitor flow performance weekly and continuously improve conversion rates



Campaigns:

- Plan and execute 2-3
 campaigns per week (promotional, educational, social proof)

- Maintain a content calendar aligned with product launches, seasonal 
nts, and promotions

- Write
 copy — subject lines, preview text, body copy, and CTAs

- Manage segmentation for each send — the right message to the right people

- Balance promotional vs. value-driven content to maintain engagement and trust



 Design:

- Design clean, on-brand
 templates directly in Klaviyo's editor

- Create header graphics, product showcases, and promotional visuals

- Build modular, reusable template blocks for different
 types

- Ensure all designs are mobile-responsive and optimized for readability (our audience is 50+)

- Maintain visual consistency with our brand guidelines across every

- Use Canva or similar tools when custom graphics are needed



Testing & Optimization:

- Run structured A/B tests on subject lines, send times, content, CTAs, layouts, and flow timing

- Ensure statistical significance before drawing conclusions

- Track and report on key metrics: revenue per recipient, placed order rate, click rate, list growth, churn

- Monitor deliverability: sender reputation, spam complaints, bounce rates, authentication (SPF/DKIM/DMARC)

- Maintain list hygiene: clean inactive subscribers, manage suppression lists, segment by engagement



List Growth & Signup Forms:

- Design and optimize signup forms, popups, and landing pages in Klaviyo

- Test different offers, triggers, and placements to maximize opt-in rates

- Ensure GDPR compliance for all EU data collection



HARD REQUIREMENTS — Please only apply if you meet ALL of these:



- 2+ years hands-on experience with Klaviyo (not just "familiar with" — you've built flows, designed
s, and run campaigns)

- Proven track record of growing
 revenue for an e-commerce or DTC brand

- Deep understanding of flow architecture: welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase, win-back, replenishment, sunset

- Strong
 design skills — you can create professional, on-brand
s in Klaviyo without needing a separate designer

- Experience running structured A/B tests with proper methodology

- Strong segmentation skills: RFM analysis, engagement tiers, behavioral segments

- Understanding of deliverability: list hygiene, sender reputation, authentication

- Good copywriting skills — subject lines, body copy, and CTAs that convert

- Comfortable with data and analytics

- Can work independently without constant direction



BONUS:

- Experience with beauty, skincare, or wellness brands

- Experience marketing to 40+ or 50+ audiences

- Canva Pro, Figma, or Photoshop skills for custom
 graphics

- Basic HTML/CSS knowledge for
 customization

- Klaviyo SMS experience

- Shopify experience

- GDPR compliance knowledge



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:



- You've only used Mailchimp or basic ESPs and want to "learn Klaviyo on the job"

- You think
 marketing is just writing newsletters

- You're a strategist who needs a separate designer to make
s look good

- You can't design a clean, professional
 layout on your own

- You've never set up a proper A/B test with a clear hypothesis

- You rely on "best practices" instead of testing what actually works for a specific audience

- You're not comfortable with data, analytics, and reporting





HOW YOU'LL WORK



- Strategy & planning: You work directly with the founders on targets and priorities

- Design & build: You design and build every
 yourself in Klaviyo — strategy, copy, design, and execution in one pair of hands

- Assets: We provide brand guidelines, product photography, and creative assets. You turn them into
s that sell.



WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU



- Work directly with the founders — no bureaucracy

- Full ownership of the entire
 channel — strategy, design, and execution

- See direct impact:
 revenue is tracked and attributed

- We invest in you long-term with real training and mentorship

- Access to all tools you need — Klaviyo, Canva Pro, AI tools (we pay for subscriptions)

- Flexible hours — we care about output, not when you're online

- Growth path to Head of
 / Head of Retention



HOW TO APPLY



Please apply through our application form:

h t t p s : / / j o b s . a d e l i r a . n l / k l a v i y o - s t r a t e g i s t (REMOVE SPACES)



In the form we'll ask you:

1. Your Klaviyo experience — which flows you've built and what results you achieved

2. Examples of
s you've personally designed and built

3. Practical scenario questions — how you think about real
 marketing challenges

4. Optionally: a short Loom video introduction (strongly recommended)



We work with AI tools every day — we know exactly what an AI-written application looks like. If your application is clearly generated by ChatGPT or Claude, we will not consider it.



We review every application within 5 business days.

title: Senior Talent Sourcing Specialist – Electrical Engineering
description:
Job description:



About MeshGrid HR



MeshGrid HR is a niche recruitment agency focused exclusively on the electrical power industry across the United States and Canada. We support clients in hiring hard-to-find technical talent across the power industry including but not limited to utilities, renewables, manufacturers, datacenters etc.



What makes us different is our technical edge in talent acquisition. Our leadership has strong technical background and our sourcing team all have electrical engineering backgrounds. This helps our team understand the industry beyond keywords and job titles. We speak the language of the market and work closely with manufacturers, consulting firms, utilities, EPCs, testing companies, and other organizations across the power sector to identify and attract high-caliber talent.



Position Overview



MeshGrid HR is seeking a Senior Talent Sourcing Specialist – Electrical Engineering to support our recruitment team by identifying and engaging qualified candidates for technical and hard-to-fill positions across the electrical power industry.



This role is ideal for someone who is highly resourceful, detail-oriented, and experienced in candidate sourcing. The Senior Sourcing Agent will be responsible for building talent pipelines through platforms such as LinkedIn Recruiter, Indeed Resume, and other sourcing tools, while working closely with recruiters and leadership to support active searches and long-term talent mapping initiatives.



Because we specialize in technical hiring within the electrical power sector, candidates for this role must have a Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering- Power Systems and prior recruitment or sourcing experience. A technical educational background is essential so the individual can better understand the positions, candidate profiles, and terminology used within our market.



Key Responsibilities



Source qualified candidates for technical positions across the U.S. and Canada using LinkedIn Recruiter, Indeed Resume, job boards, internal databases, referrals, and other sourcing channels

Build and maintain strong candidate pipelines for current and future openings

Partner closely with recruiters to understand job requirements, target companies, and ideal candidate profiles

Conduct targeted talent mapping across competitors, adjacent industries, and relevant markets

Identify passive candidates and develop outreach strategies to generate interest

Maintain accurate candidate records, notes, and activity within the ATS and internal tracking systems

Support market research related to talent availability, competitors, and hiring trends

Continuously improve sourcing strategies, search strings, and outreach methods to increase efficiency and candidate quality

Help maintain organized candidate pools by discipline, geography, and seniority level

Provide feedback to the recruiting team on market conditions, candidate response trends, and pipeline challenges



Required Qualifications



Minimum a Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering is required

Previous experience in recruitment, talent sourcing, or candidate research is required

Proven experience using sourcing tools such as LinkedIn Recruiter, Indeed Resume, and similar platforms

Familiar with using Applicant Tracking System (ATS) solutions

Strong understanding of Boolean search techniques and candidate identification strategies

Excellent reading and written English communication skills

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Ability to work independently and manage multiple searches at once

Comfortable supporting technical and engineering recruitment efforts

Ability to work 9 am to 5 pm Eastern Standard Time zone, Monday through Friday



Preferred Qualifications



Experience sourcing for the electrical power industry, engineering firms, OEMs, utilities, EPCs, or technical field service organizations

Familiarity with roles such as protection & control engineers, substation engineers, power systems engineers, relay technicians, commissioning specialists, application engineers, technical sales professionals, and related positions

Experience working in a recruitment agency environment



Why Join MeshGrid HR



Join a growing niche recruitment agency with a strong reputation in the electrical power industry

Work in a specialized environment where technical knowledge is genuinely valued

Be part of a team that understands the market and takes a quality-driven approach to recruitment

Gain exposure to leading companies across the U.S. and Canadian power sectors

Play a key role in helping clients solve real hiring challenges in a critical industry

title: Entry-Level Video Editor
description:
We’re looking for a detail-oriented entry-level video editor to support our growing video production workflow.

This is a great opportunity for someone with 1–2 years of editing experience who wants to improve their skills in a structured production environment while working on professional client content.



Types of Videos You’ll Edit

You’ll work on projects such as:

• Corporate brand videos

 • Testimonial and campaign content

 • Podcast episodes (multi-camera editing)

 • Short-form social media content

 • Authority-building content for business owners



Requirements

• 1–2 years of video editing experience

 • Strong attention to detail

 • Ability to follow structured workflows and editing guidelines

 • Reliable communication and professionalism



Technical Requirements

• Must have experience using Adobe Premiere Pro

 • Some After Effects experience is a plus

 • This role is not suited for CapCut-only editors, as our workflow is built in Premiere Pro

 • Experience using Dropbox and 
 is a plus



Hardware & Internet Requirements

• A video editing computer capable of editing and exporting long footage

Workflow Expectations

Our team values quality and clean systems. Editors are expected to:

• Follow structured file naming and folder organization

Training & Support

We provide in-house training and guidance to help editors adapt to our workflow and editing standards.



Long-Term Opportunity

This role starts as a part-time position (10–20 hours per week) under a 3-month contract with $4-6 hourly rate.

Our goal is to build a long-term working relationship with someone who wants to grow with us in the content production space. As the brand grows, hours and responsibilities can increase.

title: Construction Estimator (Flooring Specialist)
description:
We are seeking a full-time, dedicated Construction Estimator (Flooring Specialist) to support a growing commercial flooring business. This role focuses on reviewing outsourced estimates, managing RFIs, and ensuring all plans, scope details, and final proposals are fully aligned before submission.



You will act as an internal quality control and coordination specialist, helping improve communication turnaround, reduce errors, and ensure accuracy across a high volume of commercial bids.



This role is ideal for someone with hands-on flooring estimating experience, strong attention to detail, and the ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities



- Review bids, takeoffs, and plans prepared by an outsourced estimation team

- Manage the RFI (Request for Information) process:

- Identify discrepancies, missing information, or scope conflicts in plans

- Send RFIs to customers or project contacts

- Follow up to ensure timely responses

- Perform detailed quality checks to ensure the project scope aligns with plans and final proposals

- Coordinate communication between the outsourced estimators and internal project managers

- Respond to internal questions regarding plans, specifications, and scope details

- Track clarifications, revisions, and updates to ensure nothing is missed

- Handle a high volume of bid reviews with speed and accuracy



Requirements

Required: Proven experience in commercial flooring estimation (must-have).



Strong understanding of:



Flooring materials, systems, and installation methods

Flooring terminology, specifications, and scope interpretation

Experience performing quantity takeoffs

Ability to read and analyze construction plans and identify discrepancies

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Highly detail-oriented with a strong quality-control mindset

Ability to work independently and manage multiple deadlines

Must be reliable and looking for long-term stability



Tools & Platforms

Measure Square ( Must Have )





Benefits:



13th Month Pay (pro-rated)

Paid Vacation & Sick Leave (in accordance with local laws)

Paid Public Holidays (based on local calendar)

Job security and stability

Career growth opportunities & performance reviews

Fun and supportive remote work environment



Work Schedule



Full-Time, 40 hours per week

Monday to Friday

8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (client business hours)

Remote



How to Apply



1. Complete this form:


/english



A 1–2 minute video introduction is required.



After submitting, reply with: “application form done”



Please answer the following questions in your reply:



2. Do you have experience with Measure Square? If yes, how many years and how do you use it?

3.  Tell me your exp in flooring estimation. Rate yourself too. (1-10)

4. What other tools have you used for flooring takeoffs and estimation?

5. Describe your experience managing RFIs and coordinating with clients or project teams.

6. Are you comfortable handling high-volume bid reviews and quality checks with minimal supervision?

7. Are you comfortable using a time-tracking tool?



Subject Line:

Construction Estimator (Flooring) – Your Name



Thank you!

title: Real Estate VA (ISA)
description:
***ATTENTION: READ THIS ENTIRE POST CAREFULLY***



How to Apply

• We hire based on the ability to follow exact protocols. To be considered, please complete the following steps precisely:

•
: Send your application to 
  Subject Line: Must include the word "COLORADO".

•  The Tech List: In the body of the
, list every Real Estate CRM and Power Dialer you have mastered.

•  Attachments: Include your Resume and a 2-minute video introducing yourself and detailing your most impressive "save" on a cold call.



**Applications that skip any of these steps will be discarded immediately**



Who We Are

We are a high-performance Real Estate team looking for a World-Class ISA to lead our outbound prospecting. We don’t need a caller; we need a partner who takes full ownership of the pipeline and thrives in a high-volume environment.



The Mission

• Outbound Mastery: Execute high-volume prospecting to FSBOs, Expireds, and Pre-Foreclosures.

•  Precision Data: Maintain meticulous CRM records. If it isn’t in the notes, it didn’t happen.

•  The Result: Identify and book "ready-to-list" appointments for our agents(Quality Appointments)



Who You Are

• The Veteran: You have a proven track record in US Real Estate cold calling.

• The Tech Expert: You can navigate multiple dialers and CRMs (KVCore, Vulcan7, etc.) simultaneously without breaking a sweat.

• The KPI Machine: You hit your daily targets for Dials, Contacts, and Appointments, no excuses.



What’s In It For You?

We reward results, not just hours. We are looking for a long-term partner to grow with our team.



• Base Pay: $4.00 USD per hour.

• Aggressive Bonuses: Earn significant commissions for every Appointment Met and every Closed Deal.

• Career Path: This starts as a Part-Time role with a direct path to Full-Time for a proven "KPI Machine."

• Ownership: You aren't just a caller; you are a key stakeholder in our lead routing and conversion strategy.

Remote • Full-Time Contractor • Competitive Compensation + Growth



**APPLY HERE: 
/careers/51



PMHOA Pro is the leading outsourced business development partner helping home service providers (roofers, remediation, HVAC, cleaning, plumbing, landscaping, etc.) win relationships with Property Managers and HOAs across the U.S.



We are expanding our elite sales team and looking for a full-cycle Closer who can call inbound/warm opportunities, meet with them on Zoom, and close deals confidently.



If you thrive in a fast-moving sales environment and have the numbers to back up your performance, we want to talk.





// What You’ll Be Doing



You will own the full sales cycle:

- Calling qualified prospects already in our CRM or sourcing your own leads

- Running booked and self-scheduled meetings via Zoom (as needed)

- Conducting structured discovery conversations

- Presenting services, pricing, and territory options

- Handling objections with confidence

- Negotiating and finalizing agreements

- Handing off closed deals to onboarding and fulfillment



Additional responsibilities include:

- Managing and updating pipeline stages in HubSpot

- Calling unworked and follow-up leads in the queue

- Collaborating with sales team to increase show-up rates

- Reporting weekly numbers and deal progress



// Role Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

- Proven experience closing warm B2B leads

- Strong phone presence and comfort calling prospects directly

- Excellent discovery skills and active listening

- Ability to control the call without sounding pushy

- Confidence running full discovery ? offer ? objection ? close

- Organized, reliable, and process-driven with strong CRM discipline

- Data-focused mindset (show-up rate, close rate, revenue tracked)

- Ability to commit to consistent weekly availability



[!] This is not cold calling strangers. Every contact is warm, pre-educated, and entered by Setters, Webinars, or our Research team [!]



// Bonus Points (We Can Train These)

- Experience selling to home service companies

- HubSpot or similar CRM familiarity

- Prior remote sales or BDR roles

- Understanding of property management relationships



You don’t need to know our industry — but you must already know how to close.



// Must Submit to Be Considered

- We don’t accept guesses — only performance. Please provide:

- Past 6–12 months closing metrics, including:

--- Show-up rate

--- Close rate

--- Average deal size

--- Total revenue closed

--- Industry sold into

--- 3–5 recorded closing calls (highly preferred)

- Short Loom or video introduction

- Brief outline of your closing method or call flow



// What You Get

- High volume of warm, qualified opportunities

- Proven scripts, call flows, and presentation frameworks

- Continuous training, coaching, and leadership development

- Fast-moving team with significant growth potential

- Flexible remote work with performance-based earnings



// Do Not Apply If You Are

- Trying to “get into closing” without a track record

- Easily discouraged or unwilling to make outbound calls

- Avoidant of CRM usage or data updates

- Dependent on high-pressure sales tactics

- Uncomfortable being measured on performance



// PAY RATE:

- Pay: PHP80K-120K/month DOE + Commission

- Commission: Paid per signed contract [uncapped]

- Earning Potential: High-performers hit PHP200,000+ per month

- Commission is uncapped — show us you can close and you’ll write your own paycheck.



// How to Apply

- Send the following:

- Résumé

- Verified sales statistics

- Loom or video introduction (strongly recommended)

- Call recordings (if available)



**APPLY HERE: 
/careers/51

title: Needed ASAP - Project Based Real Estate Photo Editor
description:
- We are not looking for real estate graphic designer, we are looking for real estate photo editor



Who We Are



C3 Studios is a remote post-production team supporting video production companies, agencies, and marketing teams. As we continue to grow, we are expanding into real estate photo editing to support our clients with fast, high-quality deliverables.



Our clients are primarily based in the United States (CST), and we operate with structured workflows to ensure quick turnaround and consistent quality.



Who We're Looking For



We are looking for a skilled Real Estate Photo Editor who can support us immediately for 3 days (Thursday to Saturday) due to temporary coverage needs.



This is a time-sensitive opportunity, with strong potential for a long-term partnership as we continue to grow this service.



The right candidate is:



-Proficient in HDR merging (a must) 



- Experienced in real estate photo editing



- Highly detail-oriented with strong color correction and exposure balancing skills



- Reliable and able to meet daily turnaround deadlines



- Efficient and consistent in delivering client-ready images



- Comfortable working with structured workflows and deadlines



Employment Type



Project-Based (Immediate Need: 3 Days)

Potential for Long-Term Work Based on Performance



Schedule & Workflow:



-Photos are typically sent End of Day (CST)



-Work is completed during daytime in the Philippines



-Final edits must be submitted before or during the client’s morning (CST)



Example Workflow:



-Files received: 8:00 PM CST (9:00 AM PH Time)



-Editing window: Morning to afternoon (PH Time)



-Submission: 9:00–10:00 PM PH Time



Key Responsibilities

Photo Editing & Enhancement



Edit real estate photos to be bright, clean, and visually appealing



Perform color correction, exposure balancing, and white balance adjustments



Image Quality & Consistency



Ensure all images meet professional real estate standards



Maintain consistency across all images in a set



Turnaround & Delivery



Complete edits within the required same-day turnaround



Deliver client-ready images on time daily



Required Skills & Experience

Technical Skills



-Strong experience in Adobe Photoshop (required)



-Experience with real estate photo editing workflows



Editing Skills



-Exposure blending / HDR (preferred)



-Straightening lines and correcting perspective



-Sky replacement (if needed)



-Basic object removal / cleanup



Reliability & Speed



-Able to handle fast turnaround times



-Consistent and dependable during the 3-day coverage period



Communication



-Able to communicate clearly and provide updates if needed



If you are available immediately (Wednesday–Saturday) and have experience in real estate photo editing, we’d love to hear from you.



How to Apply:



Please send:



Your portfolio (real estate edits preferred)



Your rate (per project)



Your Adobe Photoshop experience



Your availability for the next 3 days



Your typical turnaround time



We’re looking to onboard ASAP.

title: Paid Media Video Editor – Short-Form + Long-Form Expert
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled and detail-oriented Video Editor to join our creative team part-time. This role focuses exclusively on crafting video ads for paid social—ranging from short-form (6–30s) to long-form (30–120s) creatives. You will work closely with our Creative Strategist to turn structured creative briefs into visually engaging, high-converting ads for Meta platforms 
/Instagram), TikTok, and YouTube.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Edit and produce short- and long-form video ads using existing assets (video, UGC, b-roll, static)



Follow storytelling and performance frameworks (PAS, AIDA, Problem–Solution–CTA, testimonials, etc.)



Maintain visual appeal while focusing on performance optimization (e.g. scroll stop, pacing, retention)



Create multiple versions and formats for creative testing and platform variations



Implement precise feedback from Creative Strategist and adapt based on performance KPIs



Maintain organized file management, naming conventions, and follow SOPs



Ensure clean delivery of final files (ratios, subtitles, formats for Meta, TikTok, YouTube)



QUALIFICATIONS

Proven experience as a video editor for paid advertising (portfolio required)



Skilled in editing both short (6–30s) and long-form (30–120s) performance ads



Strong understanding of ad structures and conversion-focused storytelling



Proficient in editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut, etc.)



Precise, fast-working, structured, and responsive to feedback



Coachable and fast learner – understands instructions quickly and asks the right questions



Basic knowledge of creative KPIs (Hook Rate, CTR, Watch Time, etc.) is a plus



MUST ALSO HAVE:

A dedicated home office setup conducive to professional video editing tasks.

High-speed internet connection (over 50 Mbps).

A high-performance computer capable of handling extensive video editing software.



WORKING HOURS & COMPENSATION

Part-Time Position: ~4 hours per day (Mon–Fri), ideally between 9 am – 1 pm Manila Time

Compensation: $400 USD per month (with room to grow as performance scales)

Long-term collaboration preferred



HOW TO APPLY:

To be considered, please submit:

Your updated resume highlighting relevant experience



A 2–3 minute introduction video (uploaded to Vimeo or YouTube) – Tell us about your background and why you're a great fit



3–5 examples of video ads or social media campaigns you've edited



NOTE: Incomplete applications will not be considered. We are looking for someone who values clarity, precision, and creativity.

We are excited to review your creative and professional qualifications!

title: Instagram Content Posting VA (Google Drive + Scheduling Tool)
description:
Training Provided | Long-Term Opportunity | Growth to Full-Time



We are looking for a highly organised and reliable Virtual Assistant to help manage and schedule content across multiple Instagram accounts.



This is a simple but very important role within our company. Your main responsibility will be ensuring that content is uploaded, scheduled, and posted on time without errors.



You will be given clear step-by-step training and systems, so no previous experience is required. However, experience with content posting, social media scheduling tools, or Instagram management is a bonus.



The most important qualities we are looking for are:



• Strong organisation

• Ability to follow instructions carefully

• Good communication with tea
mbers

• Ability to learn systems quickly

• Reliability and consistency



If you are someone who enjoys structured tasks and keeping things organised, this role will be a great fit.



We value long-term tea
mbers, and for the right person this role can grow into a stable full-time position with increased pay and bonuses.



Your Responsibilities



• Download content from Google Drive

• Upload and schedule posts using our scheduling software (
)

• Add captions to posts using our provided guidelines

• Ensure all posts are scheduled correctly and on time

• Keep track of content and posting schedules

• Communicate with tea
mbers if anything is missing or needs fixing



Everything you will do will be taught through clear training materials and systems.



Requirements



We are looking for someone who:



• Is very organised and detail-oriented

• Can follow instructions exactly

• Learns new systems quickly

• Communicates clearly with the team

• Is reliable and consistent with their work

• Has a stable internet connection



Bonus (not required):



• Experience as a content posting VA

• Experience using 
 or other scheduling tools

• Experience managing Instagram accounts



Pay & Hours



• Starting rate: $3 per hour

• Part-time to begin with



We believe in rewarding tea
mbers who grow with the role.



Typical pay progression:



Month 1–2:

$3 per hour (training and onboarding phase)



Month 3–6:

$3.50 per hour as responsibilities increase



Tea
mbers who perform well typically receive additional pay increases after the 3–6 month period, along with the opportunity for increased hours and additional responsibilities.



For the right person, this role can grow into:



• A full-time position

• Increased hours

• Performance bonuses

• Long-term stable work



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with our company long-term.



How to Apply



Please read carefully and follow the instructions below.

Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.





Step 1:



At the top of your application, write the word:



ORGANIZED



Step 2:



Use this format for the subject line of your application:



Content VA – Your Name – Organised



Example:



Content VA – Maria Santos – Organised



Step 3:



Answer the following questions:



1- Why do you believe you are a highly organised person? Give a short example.



2- Have you ever scheduled social media posts or managed accounts before? If yes, briefly explain. If not, that is completely okay.



3- Imagine you scheduled 10 posts for tomorrow and noticed that 3 of them are missing captions. What would you do?



Step 4 (Quick Caption Test):



Rewrite this caption so it sounds more engaging:



“New post is live. Go check it out.”



Step 5:



Please include your WhatsApp number so we can add you to our team communication group if you are shortlisted.



HIGHLY IMPORTANT TASK:



To help us get to know you better, please record a short video (30–60 seconds) answering the following question:



“Why is organisation important when scheduling social media content?”



Upload the link to your video in your application.



Applicants who DON'T complete this step will not be considered



Final Step:



At the very end of your application, include the sentence:



I am detail-oriented and ready to learn.



> Important: Applications sent within the first 10 minutes of posting will be reviewed first.





If you are reliable, organised, and eager to learn, we would love to hear from you.

title: Freelance Lightroom Editor Needed :)
description:
Hey there,



My name is Tamarah Christine, and I am a wedding and portrait photographer based out of Ontario, Canada. I’m currently looking for a dedicated photo editor to support me through my upcoming wedding and session season, with the goal of building a long-term working relationship.



For this year, I currently have 9 weddings booked between July–October (hoping to book more), along with additional sessions that will continue to be added. I am looking for someone reliable who can grow with me as my workload increases.



What I need help with:



- Editing approximately 500–800 images per wedding in Lightroom  

- Editing approximately 100–150 images per session  

- Using tools such as cropping, straightening, exposure adjustments, white balance, colour correction, and overall fine-tuning  

- Ensuring consistency in tone, mood, and storytelling across galleries  



Please note: I do not use AI editing tools — all edits are done manually to match my style. You will be provided with guidance and reference edits so you can align with my vision.



Compensation:



- $0.15 CAD per image edited    



Turnaround Times:



- Weddings: 12-14 business days  

- Sessions: 5-7 business days  



What I’m looking for:



- Reliable, organized, and detail-oriented  

- Strong sense of consistency and storytelling through editing  

- Able to take feedback well and apply it quickly  

- Meets deadlines and communicates clearly  

- Takes pride in producing high-quality work  

- Excited about editing emotional, cinematic wedding and lifestyle imagery  

- Interested in building a long-term working relationship  



What I’m NOT looking for:



- Someone who struggles with deadlines or communication  

- Someone who cannot take constructive feedback  

- Someone looking for inconsistent or very short-term work only  





If this sounds like a good fit, please reply with the following:



- What’s your
?  

- How long have you been editing for other photographers?  

- Are you ok with seasonal work being mainly from May–October?  

- Are you looking for a long-term, stable working relationship?  

- Does the $0.15 CAD per image edited work for you?  

- Are you ok with the required turnaround times for editing?  

- Do you have Lightroom and/or Photoshop?  

- Why are you excited to apply to this position? Why do you think you're a great fit?  

- Do you have a strong and reliable internet connection?  

- Can you share examples of edited work that you enjoyed working on?  

- What is an inspirational quote that makes you happy? :)  



---



I will only be responding to applicants selected for the next step in the process.



Looking forward to connecting,  

Tamarah Christine

title: SEO Specialist
description:

Provide monthly maintenance for existing client websites (updates, backups, uptime monitoring, bug fixes, form testing, broken link checks)

Implement and monitor security best practices (security plugins, malware scans, hardening, backup systems, and recovery if needed)

Portfolio of 3+ sites you built (include URLs and your contributions)

WordPress + Elementor proficiency (or equivalent modern WP workflow)

Experience maintaining multiple WordPress sites over time

Familiarity with DNS, hosting panels, and migrations (Cloudflare, cPanel, etc.)

Familiarity with security and backup tools (malware scans, hardening practices)

Clear client communication; organized and detail-oriented



Nice-to-haves

Experience with Tailwind, block editor, or other lightweight builders

GA4/GTM custom events, A/B testing, heatmaps

Image optimization (WebP/AVIF), caching, CDN

Git workflow and reusable component libraries



What we offer

Hourly pay depending on experience

Supportive, casual work environment that values your creativity



How to apply

Please include the following in your resume:

A link to your portfolio and three specific URLs you built, noting your role on each

Your weekly availability and your target hourly rate, and apply through onlinejobs.ph

title: Long-Form YouTube Video Editor — Finance History Documentary Channel
description:
About the Channel:

We run a finance and economic history YouTube channel producing long-form documentary videos (90 minutes). The style is serious and cinematic — think PBS Frontline meets Ken Burns. We publish 3 videos per week.



What You'll Be Editing:

Each video uses three visual types that you will source and assemble:

AI-generated oil painting illustrations (generated via ai tools),

Archival and public domain footage/photos (Library of Congress, National Archives, Smithsonian),

Stock footage from Storyblocks (we provide access),



Each video also includes a 30–45 second on-camera host intro that gets added to the main content.



What We're Looking For:

Experience editing long-form YouTube videos (45+ minutes) — portfolio required,

Ability to source and mix multiple visual types (AI illustrations, archival footage, stock),

Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, CapCut or DaVinci Resolve,

Reliable communicator — must respond to messages within 24 hours,

Able to deliver 3 videos per week



Requirements — Please answer ALL of these in your application:



Share a link to your portfolio including at least one video 45 minutes or longer that you edited

What tools do you use for sourcing stock footage and archival images?

What is your typical turnaround time for a 90-minute video?



To ensure you read this entire post, please share your favorite movie at the top of your reply. 



Rate: $40 USD per video

Payment: Weekly via Wise



Do not apply if: You cannot share a portfolio, you have not edited long-form documentary-style content before, or you cannot commit to weekly delivery deadlines.

title: Full time AI video creator
description:
Hiring: AI Content Creation VA (Short-Form Video)



We are a social media content company that creates short-form video content for health and wellness brands on Instagram. We use AI tools to generate images, voiceovers, talking head videos, and motion clips, then edit everything together into finished Instagram Reels.



This is a long-term position, not a one-time project.



What you will be doing:



- Using AI tools to generate realistic images of characters (Nano Banana Pro)

- Generating natural sounding voiceovers (ElevenLabs)

- Creating talking head videos (HeyGen)

- Generating motion video clips (Google Veo 3)

- Editing everything together into polished short-form videos (CapCut or your preferred editing software)

- Using Claude AI to write prompts and improve your work quality



You do not need prior experience with these specific tools. We have a full 9-stage onboarding program that trains you on everything step by step. But you do need to be someone who learns fast and pays attention to detail.



What we are looking for:



- Reliable and consistent. You show up every day and communicate if something comes up. This is the number one thing we care about.

- Detail-oriented. The difference between a good video and a bad one comes down to small details.

- Coachable. You take feedback seriously and apply it to your next video.

- Has their own laptop or desktop computer with a stable internet connection.

- Has their own video editing software (CapCut works great).

- Can follow instructions carefully without needing to be told the same thing twice.



Schedule:



Daily check-in at 9:00 AM PHT. All work for the day must be completed and submitted by 8:00 PM PHT.



Pay:



$500/month.



Onboarding:



Before you start producing content, you will go through our 9-stage onboarding program. This usually takes about 5 days to complete and covers every tool and skill you need. Onboarding is unpaid but mandatory. It is designed to fully prepare you so you can do the job at a high level from day one.



To apply:



Do not just send me a message saying you are interested. To be considered for this position you must complete the following test assignment and include it in your application:




 



Applications without the completed assignment will not be reviewed. This is how we filter for people who actually pay attention and follow instructions.



If you have any questions about the role, include them in your message along with your completed assignment.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

ntum

title: We're Hiring: Facebook Ads Media Buyer
description:
Meta Ads Media Buyer — Marketing Agency | Remote | $1,500–$2,000/month



What We Do



We run Meta ads for outdoor living contractors (pergolas, pools, turf, pavers, outdoor kitchens) across the US. Our model is simple: we generate leads, our setters book appointments, contractors close deals. We charge per appointment. If the ads don't perform, clients leave. If they perform, clients stay and grow. The media buyer is the most important role in our company.



What You'll Own



You will manage 15–25 Meta ad accounts independently. That means:



Campaign strategy, setup, and optimization across all accounts. You d
 what to test, when to scale, when to kill. Nobody is going to tell you what buttons to press.



Creative direction: You write briefs for our video editor, review output, and d
 what runs. You don't need to edit video, but you need to know what converts.



Cost per lead and cost per appointment are your numbers. You own them. If CPL is high, you fix it. You don't wait for someone to tell you there's a problem.



Landing page and lead form optimization. You'll work inside GoHighLevel (GHL) to build and test funnels. If you haven't used GHL, that's fine. But you need to understand funnel logic.



Who This Is For



You've managed Meta campaigns for local service businesses. not ecom, not info products, not dropshipping. Local. You understand targeting, lead forms vs landing pages, and why cost per lead alone is a bad metric without conversion data behind it.



You can look at an ad account and within 10 minutes tell me what's wrong and what you'd test first. Not because you read it in a course.



You don't need to be managed. You need to be pointed in a direction and left alone to produce results. If you need daily check ins and hand holding, this is not the role.



Who This Is NOT For

If you completed a Meta ads course and now call yourself a media buyer, don't apply!



If your experience is boosting posts for restaurants, don't apply!



If you need someone to review every decision before you make it, don't apply!



Compensation

$1,500–$2,000/month depending on experience. This is a full-time remote position. We're a small team that communicates on Slack. We don't do daily standups or unnecessary meetings.



We do results.



Apply here: 



We care if you can think independently and deliver results. If that's you, apply. If you're not sure, it's probably not.

s

/Instagram ad optimization knowledge

title: Property Management Operations Assistant
description:
About the Company



Providence Property Management is a a startup property management company based in Southwest Florida with a clear purpose: to deliver peace by stewarding real estate investments faithfully. We manage single-family homes and small multifamily properties across Charlotte, Desoto, and Sarasota Counties, and we exist to serve property owners through a structured, long-term rental management system that increases income, lowers losses, and provides superior service that far outweighs the cost.



As a growing company, we are actively building systems, refining processes, and assembling a team that will scale with us. The right person will not only contribute to daily operations but will also grow with the company over time.



The Role



This position is for an Operational Assistant. This is a jack-of-all-trades support role that assists with the day-to-day operations of the company, including leasing support, maintenance coordination, administrative execution, and general property management functions.



This is a highly tech-driven role. You will be working within multiple systems daily, including Notion, LeadSimple, Buildium, and other internal tools. You must be comfortable learning and operating within structured systems while maintaining accuracy and organization.



Your responsibilities will include, but are not limited to, coordinating maintenance requests, onboarding and off boarding clients, assisting with the leasing processes, updating and maintaining systems, documenting communication, performing data entry, and scraping and organizing lead data. This role supports the overall operations of the company and may include tasks that are not explicitly listed here as needs evolve.



This is a fast-paced environment that requires the ability to manage multiple responsibilities at once while maintaining a high level of accuracy. You must be able to move quickly without sacrificing attention to detail.



Success in this role is measured by outcomes, not effort. Tasks must be completed correctly, communication must be clear and professional, and systems must remain accurate and up to date at all times. Small mistakes are not small in this business.



Requirements



- High-level English proficiency (written and verbal, clear and natural communication)

- Strong attention to detail and ability to follow instructions exactly

- Proficiency in Google Workspace (Gmail, Google Docs, Google Sheets)

- Proficiency in ChatGPT and ability to use it effectively in daily work

- Fast and reliable internet connection (screenshot required)

- Quiet, distraction-free workspace suitable for professional communication

- Clear, high-quality audio for calls and recordings (no background noise or echo)

- Consistent responsiveness and reliability during working hours



Preferred experience includes familiarity with Notion, LeadSimple, Buildium, or similar CRM and property management systems.



How We Operate (Core Values)



Faithful Stewardship

“We believe our tea
mbers should act as they were the business/property owner. We value initiative over passivity, results over excuses, and longevity over short cuts. Our company’s compensation structures will always be aligned with this value.”



Operational Unity

“We believe the greatest marketplace advantage is a team that moves as one unit. We will seek to put the company as a whole above any private agendas, personal competitions, and even our own convenience. Clarity of vision, radical transparency and consistent communication will be a hallmark of our internal relationships.”



Personal Growth

“We believe the health of the company cannot exceed the health of its people. We are committed to the continual growth of every tea
mber, whether that’s professionally, personally, or spiritually. Coaching and reading will be a cornerstone in the life of all tea
mbers.”



These are the standards we operate by and the expectations we have for every tea
mber.



Good Fit



This role is best suited for someone who is looking for a long-term opportunity where they can grow within a company. You should be someone who takes initiative instead of waiting for direction, notices problems and works toward solutions, and values doing things right, not just getting them done.



You should be comfortable working within structured systems while also thinking independently. You should be able to manage multiple responsibilities without becoming disorganized or overwhelmed. You should take pride in your communication and understand that every message, update, and task reflects the company.



You should demonstrate strong problem-solving ability and resourcefulness, taking the initiative to figure things out and propose solutions rather than waiting for direction.



As you become more proficient and efficient in this role, pay increases are available, along with opportunities for promotion and specialization within the company as we expand.



This is a role for someone who is committed to growing within the same company, not someone who is actively shopping for the next best position.



Application Instructions



To apply, please submit your resume along with the following items. Please be careful to follow all instructions accurately to ensure your resume is considered.



- A video introducing yourself that is no longer than 60 seconds. Your video must have clear, professional-quality audio and must be recorded in a quiet, distraction-free environment. Submit your video in .WEBM format.

- An introduction letter that contains the following and begins with “I believe the operations assistant position is for me because”

    --- Review our three core values. Answer which of the three do you most align with and which do you least align with? Please give specific examples for both.

    --- A brief summary of your understanding of our company’s business model. For your research, we are called a “Fee-based, 3rd party, long-term, residential property management company”.

- Provide a screenshot of your internet speed test.

- Complete a DISC personality assessment and submit your results.



Final Note



We are not looking for the fastest applicant. We are looking for the most aligned applicant.



Take your time. Please follow the instructions carefully. 



This is a long-term opportunity for the right person. If selected, you will be part of a growing, system-driven company where your work matters and your development is taken seriously.



If this aligns with how you work and how you think, we look forward to reviewing your application.

Coastal Breeze Getaways is a premier short-term rental management company on Florida’s Gulf Coast, founded by a former electrical engineer who brings high-level precision and data-driven systems to the hospitality space. 



Because we are active investors ourselves, we operate with a unique edge: we treat every single property we manage with the exact same care and strategic oversight as our own assets. 



We pride ourselves on a transparent, family-oriented culture where hard work is deeply rewarded, making this the perfect home for a high-performer who wants to grow alongside a scalable, tech-forward business.





Preferred Languages:

* English (Fluent)

* Spanish (Highly Preferred) – Many of our guests speak Spanish, so the ability to communicate comfortably in Spanish by message or phone is a major advantage.



Responsibilities:

* Guest Experience (Core Frontline Responsibilities)

* Respond to all guest messages, booking inquiries, and issues via Guesty, OpenPhone,
, and social channels

* Maintain fast response times and professional communication with guests before, during, and after their stay

* Call guests directly when necessary to resolve urgent issues, clarify questions, or de-escalate concerns quickly

* Troubleshoot common guest issues such as check-in questions, lockouts, amenities concerns, or property questions

* De-escalate guest concerns professionally and resolve issues quickly to maintain exceptional guest experiences

* Coordinate late check-outs and early check-ins with guests, housekeeping, and maintenance staff

* Work cross-functionally with our local operations team to escalate urgent guest or maintenance needs in real time

* Offer thoughtful solutions that balance guest satisfaction with company policies

* Reach out to past guests for repeat booking opportunities and contact upcoming guests about stay extensions

* Review and respond to guest reviews using reputation management best practices and AI-assisted tools

* Submit and manage review disputes with OTAs (Airbnb, VRBO) when appropriate

* Update house manuals, digital guides, and listing descriptions when property updates occur

* Support guests pre-stay, during their stay, and post-stay to ensure a seamless experience

* Document systems and processes and help improve and automate workflows where possible



Accountability & Performance Metrics: Guest Experience

* Maintain response time under 15 minutes across communication platforms (Goal: Superhost / Preferred Partner status)

* Maintain 4.95+ average guest review rating across all listings

* Resolve urgent guest issues (lockouts, tech issues, access questions) within 5–10 minutes of report

* Track and report weekly guest feedback trends and suggest improvements to the property experience



Skills & Qualifications:

* At least 1 year of guest communication experience with Airbnb, VRBO, or other short-term rental platforms

* Strong problem-solving and conflict resolution skills

* Confident speaking with guests on the phone and comfortable making calls when issues arise

* Ability to remain calm and solution-focused when handling guest concerns

* Excellent written English and guest communication skills

* Ability to make independent decisions while following established processes

* Strong attention to detail and organizational skills: Secret Code CBGAGES310

* Comfortable using Guesty, WhatsApp, OpenPhone, Google Drive, and remote collaboration tools

* Self-starter who takes ownership of tasks and identifies ways to improve operations

* Spanish speaking ability is a strong plus and helpful when assisting Spanish-speaking guests

* Bonus: Experience with Notion



Salary:

* Position & Length: Contractor (Remote) 1-Year (12 months) 

* Rate of Pay: $4-$6 USD (depending on experience)

* Scheduled Hours Minimum: 45 hours (Must Track Hours) 

* Scheduled Hours Maximum: 50 hours (Anything above needs approval) 

* Agreed Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8AM–5PM Eastern Time

* Pay Schedule: Monthly via Wise or preferred method

With the submission of hours worked



Subject Line please add: AGES Coastal 

Please have an ID score of 70+

Please provide the secret code in the message 

Application Deadline: March 27, 2026
